data.raw_snippet: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 d
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub – a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations
  
  
**About The Role**
Do you enjoy leading complex enterprise programmes and bringing clarity, structure, and momentum to large‑scale change?
  
  
You’ll manage end‑to‑end delivery of our Enterprise Systems portfolio, spanning ERP, HCM, Finance, Procurement, EPM, Automation, and Corporate Platforms.
  
  
In this critical role, you’ll also set the benchmark for reliable and secure programme delivery, fully aligned with our Enterprise Systems Operating Model.
  
  
Your focus will be on enabling stable, scalable, and high‑performing enterprise solutions, while ensuring operational continuity is never compromised.
  
  
Importantly, you’ll provide end‑to‑end ownership of enterprise initiatives, driving stakeholder alignment, vendor performance, disciplined change and release management, and deployment readiness.
  
  
This role also champions continuous improvement, risk management, and a strong focus on safety and operational readiness.
  
  
As a people leader, you will build, coach, and empower high‑performing teams, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning.
  
  
If you’re ready to lead complex enterprise programmes with real impact, we’d love to hear from you.
  
  
**About You**
Degree qualified, you will demonstrate a minimum of 10 years' experience in Enterprise Systems delivery, ERP, HRIS, Finance, Procurement, EPM, or Digital Transformation.
  
  
You are expected to have strong track record in vendor management, stakeholder engagement, and aligning IT with business goals.
  
  
Your expertise includes programme planning, financial oversight, and risk management within regulated settings.
  
  
We’d love to hear from you even more if you have proven leadership experience managing programme teams, stakeholders, and delivery partners across enterprise initiatives.
  
  
This is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best and show us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air.
  
  
Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.

data.title: Technical Office Manager / Project Management Office
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled Technical Office Manager to lead the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of Project Management Office frameworks, processes, and governance structures. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in project
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled Technical Office Manager to lead the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of Project Management Office frameworks, processes, and governance structures. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in project management consultancy, particularly within major government and semi-government programs, and a proven track record of delivering project excellence.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and implement comprehensive PMO plans, processes, and governance frameworks to oversee, coordinate, and report on all project activities.
* Establish and maintain project management consultancy policies and procedures.
* Develop project management frameworks and strategies, including standards, reporting templates, KPIs, performance dashboards, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Implement standardized project management and business analysis methodologies across projects.
* Provide regular status updates to Project Management leadership, highlighting progress, risks, and improvement outcomes.
* Develop and manage tools for project budgeting, fiscal control, contract administration, and quality assurance.
* Conduct research and prepare reports related to operations, equipment, policies, procedures, and other organizational requirements.
* Evaluate detailed project status reports and present key insights and business implications to executives and stakeholders.
* Provide coaching, guidance, and leadership to project team leaders while maintaining high levels of integrity, motivation, and morale.
* Perform additional duties as assigned by the Line Manager.

**Qualifications & Requirements**

* Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or a related discipline from an accredited university.
* **Minimum of 15 years**
  of relevant experience in project management consultancy roles, including leadership of major government and/or semi-government programs and projects.
* Proven experience delivering excellence in direct project management roles.
* **At least 5 years of experience**
  in a PMO role, with strong knowledge of PMO tools, systems, and best practices.
* Proficiency in relevant computer applications and project management software tools.
* Ability to travel within the Kingdom to monitor project performance and ensure compliance with established procedures.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

data.title: PMO - Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
The Project Director will lead large‑scale data center development programs, overseeing EPC/EPCM delivery, PMO governance, and multi‑vendor execution across complex, mission‑critical environments. This role requires deep technical expertise in MEP and data center infrastructure, stro
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
The Project Director will lead large‑scale data center development programs, overseeing EPC/EPCM delivery, PMO governance, and multi‑vendor execution across complex, mission‑critical environments. This role requires deep technical expertise in MEP and data center infrastructure, strong command of regulatory frameworks in KSA, and proven leadership in managing global contractors, OEMs, and stakeholders. The ideal candidate brings a strategic mindset, operational excellence, and the ability to drive projects from concept through commissioning and handover.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead end‑to‑end EPC/EPCM project delivery, ensuring alignment with PMO governance, program controls, and organizational objectives
* Oversee multi‑vendor coordination including designers, contractors, OEMs, and commissioning agents
* Manage project risk, cost, schedule, and contract performance across all phases
* Provide technical leadership on MEP systems, electrical redundancy (N+1, 2N), cooling architectures, and critical facility design
* Ensure compliance with KSA regulatory frameworks including NCA ECC, SAMA, CITC, and MOMRAH
* Implement and enforce ISO 27001, ISO 22301, and cybersecurity requirements across project lifecycle
* Lead contract negotiation, claims management, SLA/KPI enforcement, and vendor performance reviews
* Drive operational readiness including SOP/MOP/EOP development, O&M preparation, and commissioning strategy
* Oversee testing & commissioning (T&C), integrated systems testing, and final handover to operations
* Engage effectively with government authorities, investors, and C‑level executives in multicultural environments
* Provide executive‑level reporting, dashboards, and communication to internal and external stakeholders

****Requirements****

* 18+ years of experience in project management, EPC/EPCM delivery, or large‑scale infrastructure programs
* Proven track record managing mission‑critical facilities, preferably hyperscale or enterprise data centers
* Strong technical understanding of MEP systems, electrical redundancy (N+1, 2N), cooling systems, and critical facility design principles
* Familiarity with Uptime Institute standards (TCDD, TCCF, TCOS)
* Demonstrated experience working within KSA regulatory frameworks (NCA ECC, SAMA, CITC, MOMRAH)
* Strong knowledge of ISO 27001, ISO 22301, and cybersecurity compliance
* Expertise in vendor management, contract negotiation, claims resolution, and performance governance
* Experience leading commissioning, integrated testing, and operational readiness programs
* Excellent communication and leadership skills with the ability to influence senior stakeholders
* Ability to work in fast‑paced, multicultural environments
* Preferred Certifications: PMP, PgMP, LEED AP, ITIL

data.raw_snippet:

**Description**
We are looking for a Program Management Executive (Implementations) with strong technical operations skills to support Tabby’s merchant and channel partner ecosystem. This role sits at the center of our cross-functional engine
data.jd_text:
**Department:**
Commercial Operations

**Location:**
KSA

**Description**
We are looking for a Program Management Executive (Implementations) with strong technical operations skills to support Tabby’s merchant and channel partner ecosystem. This role sits at the center of our cross-functional engine — working closely with various departments to ensure merchants are set up for success from day one.
  
  
You will play a key role in technical onboarding, operational coordination, and product rollout execution. Your work ensures that merchants implement Tabby in the most optimal way and deliver a seamless payment experience across all touchpoints.
  
  
This is a fast-paced role that requires someone who is detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable navigating both technical concepts and business conversations.
  
  
If you enjoy solving operational challenges, improving processes, and working across multiple teams to deliver merchant success at scale — this role is for you.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Serve as the primary operational and technical liaison between Tabby and partner merchants, coordinating closely with Risk, Integrations, BD, and Key Account teams.
* Oversee merchant and channel partner technical onboarding, including documentation preparation, testing coordination, tracking progress, and ensuring timely activation.
* Manage merchant data-enablement workflows, ensuring required data is captured, validated, and aligned with risk and underwriting requirements.
* Lead and manage negotiations with merchants about technical requirements, ensuring they understand Tabby’s data, integration, and compliance needs while balancing business objectives.
* Coordinate cross-functional alignment on product rollouts by preparing merchant-facing materials, supporting GTM plans, and ensuring seamless execution across teams.
* Analyze merchant performance and integration health, identify operational gaps, and propose improvements to enhance the merchant experience.
* Own and improve internal documentation and SOPs, ensuring processes around onboarding, integration, and partner success are scalable and standardized.
* Support BD teams during technical discussions with merchants, ensuring commitments made during sales cycles align with product and risk capabilities.

**Skills, Knowledge & Expertise**
2–4 years of experience in Partner Success, Technical Account Management, Fintech Operations, Payments, E-commerce integrations, SaaS onboarding, or similar.
  
Strong technical literacy — understanding of APIs, webhooks, e-commerce platforms, plugins, and payment flows.
  
Solid analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret data patterns and identify issues in merchant integrations or data quality.
  
Excellent cross-functional communication — able to translate technical concepts into actionable steps for non-technical stakeholders.
  
Experience managing negotiations with merchants about technical or data requirements, balancing business needs with technical feasibility.
  
Strong documentation skills with the ability to build processes, SOPs, and clear merchant-facing guides.
  
  
**Nice-to-Have Skills**
Experience with BNPL, payment gateways, PSPs, or e-commerce checkout flows.
  
Background supporting enterprise merchants and managing negotiation discussions.

**About CSI Global**
**CSI Global**
is a multi-disciplinary engineering and contracting group delivering advanced electromechanical, building MEP systems, testing and commissioning, contracting and construction solutions across the GCC and beyond. Through our group companies, we serve the power, utilities, and infrastructure sectors with full lifecycle capabilities—from tendering and design review to execution, commissioning, and handover. We combine engineering precision with commercial excellence to power progress across complex projects in the region.
  
  
**Position Overview**
We are seeking a
**PMO Assistant**
to support the Project Management Office in planning, tracking, and coordinating project activities. The ideal candidate will assist in ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in line with organizational standards.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Support PMO in project planning, scheduling, and progress tracking
* Prepare project reports, dashboards, and documentation
* Coordinate with project managers and stakeholders to collect updates
* Maintain project records, logs, and compliance documentation
* Assist in monitoring risks, issues, and action items
* Strong Organizational skills with attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks.
* Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines with minimal supervision.
* Proficient in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); strong reporting and tracking skills
* Ability to coordinate with multiple departments and handle office tasks efficiently.
* Basic knowledge of procurement processes, contracts, and project lifecycles is an advantage.
* Strong ability to create, maintain, and manage structured filling systems.
* Good working knowledge of PDF editing tools.

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field
* 3–5 years of experience in PMO or project support roles
* Strong organizational and documentation skills
* Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word); Project Management tools are a plus
* Good communication skills in English
* Project management certifications and familiarity with project management tools such as (MS Project, Primavera P6, Jira, or similar) is a plus.

data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking a Senior Project Manager with specialized expertise in property management and project delivery to lead and manage high-impact projects within our portfolio. This role requires a strategic leader who can effectively oversee property-related projects, ensuring timely delivery, quality, and compliance with all relevant standards. The Senior Project Manager will work closely with stakeholders, managing project teams to deliver exceptional results that align with business objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of property management-related projects, ensuring alignment with organizational goals
* Manage project schedules, budgets, and resources to ensure successful project completion within the defined scope
* Coordinate with property management teams and other stakeholders to ensure seamless integration of project deliverables
* Oversee risk management processes, identifying potential issues and implementing mitigation strategies
* Provide clear and timely communication to clients, vendors, and internal teams regarding project status and any changes
* Ensure compliance with industry standards, regulations, and internal policies throughout the project lifecycle
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance project delivery processes and outcomes
* Lead and mentor project teams, fostering a collaborative and high-performance work environment

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Property Management, Business Administration, or related field
* At least 10 years of progressive experience in project management, with extensive experience in property management project delivery
* Project Management Professional (PMP) or equivalent certification preferred
* Strong knowledge of property management practices and regulations
* Self starters
* Proven ability to manage complex projects, budgets, and diverse teams successfully
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
* Proficiency in project management software and tools
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, and risk management capabilities
* Good at execution and project delivery
* Can use Aconex, revit, excel, powerpoint well

data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is actively looking for a Project Manager to join our team. As a distinguished project management consultancy, JASARA PMC focuses on delivering world-class social infrastructure projects that align with Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030. In this role, you will oversee multiple projects, ensuring that they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.
  
  
The ideal candidate will be responsible for leading project teams, coordinating with various stakeholders, and managing resources effectively. You will be integral in ensuring project objectives are met while facilitating collaboration and maintaining strong communication between all parties involved.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead planning and implementation of project activities, including scope, timeline, and budget management
* Coordinate with project teams to ensure successful project execution and delivery
* Monitor and report on project progress, managing risks, and providing solutions to issues that arise
* Engage with stakeholders to define project objectives and requirements
* Ensure adherence to company standards and regulatory requirements
* Prepare and present project updates and reports to stakeholders

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Project Management, Engineering, or a related field
* Minimum 12-15 years of project management experience, preferably in construction or engineering
* Property project management experience
* Self starters
* Good at execution and project delivery
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and guide project teams
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for effective stakeholder engagement
* Proficiency in project management software and tools
* Experience with budgeting and resource management
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Can use Aconex, revit, excel, powerpoint well

**Adobe Middle East**
Adobe in the Middle East empowers businesses and individuals through creativity and digital transformation. In Saudi Arabia, we support Vision 2030 by driving innovation, developing local talent, and enabling exceptional customer experiences. As the regional headquarters for foreign companies, Adobe serves as a strategic hub for growth and collaboration across markets. Join us to help shape the future of digital experiences in one of the world’s most dynamic region.
  
  
**Our Company**
Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences. We’re passionate about empowering people to craft beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.
  
  
We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to building exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!
  
  
We believe innovative ideas can emerge from any team member, including you.
  
  
**The Role**
Join Adobe’s Professional Services organization in Riyadh as a Programme Manager/Principal Project Manager – Strategic Governance, where you will lead executive-level engagement, steer digital transformation governance, and drive the strategic value realization of Adobe’s enterprise programs across the Middle East. In this senior individual contributor role, you will be a key advisor to C-suite stakeholders and VPs, ensuring that Adobe’s platform vision, transformation roadmap, and Centers of Excellence (CoE) models translate into measurable customer outcomes.
  
  
We are seeking a Programme Manager/Principal Project Manager who can provide strategic oversight, executive governance, and multi-workstream orchestration for Adobe’s most critical regional customers. This role goes beyond delivery execution: it blends program governance, stakeholder management, business value realization, and transformation leadership to ensure that clients establish the right operating model, capabilities, and CoE structure to scale digital experiences.
  
  
As a trusted partner to both customers and Adobe’s sales organization, you will also play a vital role in helping account teams position the strategic importance of Digital Transformation Centers of Excellence, articulating how governance, operating models, and cross-functional alignment accelerate transformation maturity and long-term customer success.
  
  
**What You Will Do (Key Responsibilities)**

* Lead executive and strategic governance for Adobe programs across multiple enterprise and government clients, ensuring alignment with strategic business outcomes.
* Establish, guide, and mature Digital Transformation Centers of Excellence (CoEs), enabling customers to scale Adobe capabilities, institutionalize best practices, and build sustainable governance and innovation frameworks.
* Drive end-to-end program leadership, orchestrating multi-workstream delivery across Experience Cloud solutions, data platforms, content supply chain, and digital experience operations.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for strategic clients, building trusted relationships and ensuring business alignment
* Partner closely with the Adobe Sales team to position Adobe’s transformation approach, ensuring customers understand the value of strong governance, CoE maturity, and structured transformation roadmaps.
* Facilitate strategic workshops, steering committees, and cross-functional executive engagements to maintain alignment, de-risk delivery, and maximize value realization.
* Monitor and report on program performance, KPIs, and business value impact, ensuring clear visibility to customer leadership and Adobe stakeholders.
* Ensure operational excellence through strong oversight of schedules, budgets, dependencies, risks, and delivery quality across all engagements.
* Drive account growth by identifying opportunities for additional services and value creation.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Global Services teams to ensure customer needs are anticipated and addressed with the right solutions and delivery approach.
* Support program innovation by identifying opportunities for optimization, new use cases, and maturity acceleration through Adobe technologies and best practices.
* Apply Adobe’s services methodology, apprentice others in the methodology, and drive continuous improvements in our ways of working

**What You Need To Succeed**

* 10+ years of experience leading projects in a consulting and/or technology professional services organization
* Experience providing consulting services to high-tech customers is desirable
* Engaging people leader with demonstrable ability to lead and encourage teams
* Strong executive presence, including the ability to partner with and effectively influence client managers, directors, VPs, CMOs, and CXOs
* Proven organizational skills to plan and coordinate complex projects
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* High degree of intellectual curiosity and ability to absorb new concepts quickly
* High level of energy and personal drive
* Experience with one or more of the following: digital marketing automation, web content management, personalisation, ecommerce, web analytics and tag management, technology/software/SAAS concepts, custom software development processes and methodologies (including managing Agile projects and scaled agile), technology project management, and governance
* Familiarity with local regulations and business practices in the Saudi Arabia and Middle East
* Fluency in English and Arabic

At Adobe, you will be immersed in an exceptional work environment that is recognized throughout the world on Best Companies lists. You will also be surrounded by colleagues who are committed to helping each other grow through our unique Check-In approach where ongoing feedback flows freely.
  
  
If you’re looking to make an impact, Adobe's the place for you. Discover what our employees are saying about their career experiences on the Adobe Life blog and explore the meaningful benefits we offer.
  
  
Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome and encourage diversity in the workplace regardless of race, gender, religion, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or veteran status.
  
  
**About Adobe**
Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
  
  
Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
  
  
**Let’s Adobe together**
At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
  
  
Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
  
  
Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.
  
  
**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
  
  
At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

data.jd_text:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
  
  
**The Project**
This is an opportunity to work on one of the largest programmes in Saudi Arabia. This unique project consists of major mixed-use development including sports facilities, entertainment, and arts along with all associated infrastructure.
  
  
Mace is one of the delivery partners requiring high-calibre and experienced professionals to lead integrated teams throughout each phase of the project.
  
  
**You’ll Be Responsible For**

* Lead the end to end steelwork delivery strategy across a Major Entertainment/Leisure Asset, ensuring alignment with programme milestones.
* Oversee design assurance, constructability reviews, and compliance with international steelwork codes and standards.
* Manage the performance of the Steelwork Contractor and ensure they direct logistics, cranage strategies, heavy lifts, and site erection sequencing to ensure safe, efficient installation.
* Foster collaboration and maintain strong stakeholder relationships to meet expectations.
* Champion Mace’s Safety First values, embedding wellbeing, sustainability, and governance into every stage of delivery.
* Provide subject matter expertise, guiding teams and promoting best practice, innovation, and continuous improvement.
* Align programmes with Mace’s strategic priorities, integrating digital, data, sustainability, and Construction to Production principles.
* Drive commercial performance and business growth, contributing to reporting, bidding, resourcing, and wider organisational objectives.
* Drive exemplary HSE performance across all steelwork activities, with a focus on lifting operations and work at height.
* Provide clear programme, risk, and commercial reporting to senior stakeholders, supporting change control and governance.

**You’ll Need To Have**

* Degree in Structural/Civil Engineering (professional chartership desirable); GCC or KSA experience advantageous.
* 15+ years’ experience delivering complex steel structures on major programmes (stadia, bridges, mixed use, cultural or themed assets).
* Proven expertise in project and programme delivery with strong commercial and financial acumen.
* Leadership experience managing diverse teams and senior stakeholder relationships.
* Knowledge of sustainability, risk management, and innovative programme practices shaping future delivery.
* Proven track record managing Steelwork Contractors in fast paced mega projects environments.
* Demonstrable leadership in HSE for steelworks, including heavy lifts and high risk operations.
* Strong commercial, programme, and risk management capability with excellent client facing communication.

**Our values**
**Safety first - Going home safe and well:**
We champion a safe, diverse and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of wellbeing in every team.
  
  
**Client focus - Deliver on our promise:**
We own the quality of deliverables, strategic outcomes and build long-term relationships with our clients.
  
  
**Integrity - Always do the right thing:**
We influence positive outcomes within our industry, while always aligning with our compliance obligations.
  
  
**Create opportunity - For our people to excel:**
We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop.
  
  
Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfil all the criteria, please apply as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation.
  
  
We are also open to discussing part-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role.

data.raw_snippet:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
  
  
**Who We Are**
Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data
data.jd_text:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
  
  
**Who We Are**
Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
  
  
**Job Description**
***Job Family Definition:***
Leads customer engagement to ensure that it meets all scope, time, budget and quality expectations, through planning, controlling and managing customer projects. Manages corporate, customer and third party vendor efforts to plan, sell and implement solutions to customer problems. Responsible for business as well as team management.
  
  
**Job Family Definition For Mgr, Progr Mgmt Office**
Responsible for establishing and maintaining the portfolio and project management environment based upon Policies, Standards, Customer Engagement Roadmap and Global Method. May perform responsibilities as a member of an Engagement Program Management Office (EPMO) or as a business unit leader with responsibility for a portfolio of customer projects.
  
  
**Management Level Definition**
**Unique mastery**
and recognized authority on relevant subject matter knowledge including technologies, theories and techniques. Contributes to the development of innovative principles and ideas. Successfully operates in the most complex disciplines, in which the company must operate to be successful. Provides highly innovative solutions. Leads large, cross-division functional teams or projects that affect the organization's long-term goals and objectives. May participate in cross-division, multi-function teams. Provides mentoring and guidance to lower level employees. Routinely exercises independent judgment in developing methods, techniques and criteria for achieving objectives. Develops strategy and sets functional policy and direction. Acts as a functional manager within area of expertise but does not manage other employees as a primary job function.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Manages customer project delivery.
* Revenue as detailed in Impact section.
* Very large/ complex/ multiple regions or global.
* High/ very high risk.
* High/very high complexity legal and commercial issues.
* Manages project financials including P&L.
* Meets or exceeds SOAR approved budgets.
* Provides reliable financial forecasts to the management.
* Manages business development Identifies and develops new opportunities with client Supports early qualification and opportunity assessment for large and complex opportunities Acts as opportunity manager for high risk deals.
* Manages client relationships.
* Manages complex multi-function and/ or global delivery relationships with senior and executive ("C" level) client management.
* Communicates the direct value our capabilities will provide to our business partners and customers.
* Manages project team.
* Manages internal as well as external resources with a team size greater than 40 people.
* Mentors and encourages skill development of project team members through others.
* Provides detail performance review input and development recommendations for key contributors.
* Mentors others, providing a role model and support for individual development.

**Education And Experience Required**

* First level university degree.
* Advanced degree preferred.
* 10 years experience in project management or in like roles/businesses.

**Knowledge And Skills**
The candidate should have previous experience in managing technical infrastructure projects:
  
  

* HPE products implementations (Servers, storage, and Aruba)
* Data centre relocation projects.
* Data centre Migration projects (Physical to virtual and Virtual to Virtual)
* Data centre migrations to cloud
* Disaster recovery implementations
* SAP HANA Implementations
* SAP Application migrations to SAP HANA
* Candidate should also demonstrate an in-depth knowledge of key operational policies, processes and methodologies applicable to project management.
* PMP Certification is a plus

**Additional Skills**
Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Change Management, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Project and Program Management (Inactive), Project Management Office (PMO), Project Management Tools {+ 5 more}
  
  
**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
  
  
**Personal & Professional Development**
We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
  
  
**Unconditional Inclusion**
We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
  
  
**Let's Stay Connected**
Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
  
  
#saudiarabia
  
  
#operations
  
  
**Job**
Services
  
  
**Job Level**
Master
  
  
HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
  
  
**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
  
  
**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
**will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.**
The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

data.title: Customer Program Manager
data.raw_snippet:
Meet the team
  
  
Splunk Professional Services (PS) is a growing and dynamic organization which plays a key role in the success of our customers. Our Customer Program Managers lead customers and partners through their Splunk journey from discovery through implementation of sophisticated solutions
data.jd_text:
Meet the team
  
  
Splunk Professional Services (PS) is a growing and dynamic organization which plays a key role in the success of our customers. Our Customer Program Managers lead customers and partners through their Splunk journey from discovery through implementation of sophisticated solutions using a combination of management and technical skills. They are highly organized, strong communicators and have a real passion for driving successful customer outcomes. If you possess the ability to build relationships with both internal and external stakeholders, manage a portfolio of medium to high complexity customer projects and have established experience in commercial negotiations, project management procedures, consulting, and leading technology implementation projects, then this role may be exactly the challenge you are seeking.
  
  
**What You'll Do**

* Build customer trust through professional leadership, management and reporting of complex projects from kick off to successful delivery and close out
* Build and maintain project plans, including project P&L, outlining tasks, landmark dates and allocation of resources aligned to statements of work (SOWs)
* Implement and maintain detailed project reporting, including Project burn rate, progress against plan, risks, dependencies and assumptions ensuring this is clearly reported to the key customer stakeholders
* Understand and assess the impact of any customer specific requirements, including any specific security and onboarding requirements (i.e. background checks, fingerprints, badging, network access, etc.)
* Identify and promote opportunities for Splunk products and services to meet additional customer requirements
* Maintain a regular cadence with the sales teams to understand the upcoming opportunities and the requirements for PS engagement
* Collaborates with Sales Engineering to ensure PS is engaged in a timely manner to have sight of and the ability to influence technical detail and content
* Build customer confidence in outcomes through leveraging methodologies, blueprints, templates, Service Offerings and successful experiences with related solutions
* Understands at a high-level the solution options available to meet customer requirements and know how to leverage the relevant SMEs to ensure outcomes are clearly defined and customer expectations set
* Effectively executes the RFP/SOW process in partnership with the sales teams and supporting PS teams
* Maintains accurate and up-to-date reporting, documentation, and system information to ensure there is accurate forecasting of both bookings and revenue
* Active involvement in remediation of customer problems, serving as customer advocate to ensure problems are effectively and rapidly resolved

**Desired Skills And Experience**

* Bachelor’s degree in technology, marketing, management or equivalent field
* 5-10 years of proven experience in service and / or software sales or program management
* Strong understanding of lifecycle service, professional services and enterprise software agreements
* Ability to manage multiple customer personas and tailor communications accordingly both verbally and written
* Demonstrated leadership skills with experience managing teams and driving critical initiatives
* Proficient in forecasting, market analysis, and customer satisfaction metrics
* Proven experience leading delivery of sophisticated customer projects with cross-functional teams using waterfall and agile project delivery methodologies
* Professional Services tools familiarity; Professional Services Automation, CRM, Project Management tools, such as FinancialForce, Salesforce, Jira, etc.
* Technical competence; able to translate most customer requirements into proposals with minimal support from consultants / architects

****Hours of work:****
48 hours per week
  
  
****Benefits:****
Healthcare and Insurance, Employee Stock Purchase program, Flexible Spending Benefit, Flex and Schooling Allowances and many more.
  
  
****Application start and end date:****
Starting 14th of January for approx. 4-6 weeks
  
  
Why Cisco?
  
  
At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
  
  
Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
  
  
We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

data.jd_text:
**Job Title:**
Project Manager
  
  
**Job Type:**
Project: Roads Operations and Maintenance
  
  
**Company:**
Euro Group for Engineering Consultancy
  
  
**Job Summary**
The Project Manager will be responsible for leading and overseeing the Riyadh Municipality Roads Operations and Maintenance project. The role involves managing all aspects of the project, from planning to execution, and ensuring that project timelines, quality standards, and financial goals are met. The Project Manager will work closely with various stakeholders to ensure effective project delivery.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage the project, ensuring alignment with defined objectives and timelines.
* Prepare detailed work plans and define the scope of studies required for the project.
* Review and approve proposals and final formats related to project management and its branches.
* Suggest and implement ideal solutions for current and future project-related challenges to ensure quality and efficiency.
* Analyze and oversee all contract aspects with contractors to ensure compliance and best practices.
* Manage and lead the work team, leveraging experience and leadership skills to drive project success.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure effective communication and alignment with project goals.
* Ensure adherence to administrative and financial guidelines, utilizing authorized powers to manage and implement project programs effectively

**Qualifications**

* Education: Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering.
* Experience:

+ Minimum of 10 years of experience for Saudis.
+ Minimum of 15 years of experience for non-Saudis.
+ At least 5 years of experience in similar projects.

* Preference for candidates with a PMP certificate.
* Proficient in computer applications and applied engineering programs.
* Must be proficient in written and spoken English.
* Accredited and authenticated authorization letter from the Chamber of Commerce specifying the duration of the authorization is required.
* Must hold Saudi Council of Engineers accreditation at the minimum professional engineer level.
* Preference will be given to Saudi nationals.

**Skills And Abilities**

* Strong leadership and team management skills.
* Ability to prepare and execute comprehensive work plans.
* Excellent analytical skills for reviewing proposals and contracts.
* Strong problem-solving skills to address project challenges effectively.
* Effective communication skills in English, both written and spoken.

data.title: Senior Director - Project Director Delivery - SDU - 20012793 - CDU8
data.raw_snippet: Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a Senior Director - Project Director Delivery to lead and oversee the delivery of high-profile projects within the Strategic Delivery Unit (SDU). This leadership role requires a seasoned professional to ensure the successful execution and completion of complex p
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a Senior Director - Project Director Delivery to lead and oversee the delivery of high-profile projects within the Strategic Delivery Unit (SDU). This leadership role requires a seasoned professional to ensure the successful execution and completion of complex projects, aligning with Qiddiya's strategic goals and objectives.
  
  
The Senior Director - Project Director Delivery provides executive leadership in establishing, implementing, and maintaining the construction delivery, governance, and operating model for QDC HQ. Ensure delivery processes are developed, standardized, and rolled out across all BUs when required. Provides leadership for assigned HQ special projects accountable for meeting quality, time, budget and HSSE requirements.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establish/update delivery and project management framework for all delivery methods (including Self-Delivery, Delivery partner, CM, traditional etc.)
* Develop / update policies, processes, procedures, manuals and templates for delivery and consultancy (including PMC) for all projects and delivery methods
* Define governance process including detailed RACI matrix for all projects for Stages
* Support / coordinate with HQ Operations Director and Project Director (Design) in establishing governance and operational model for the complete program lifecycle
* Develop Project Delivery Strategy requirements and templates applicable to all projects and delivery models
* Coordinate Technical / Peer review project delivery management process and requirements with the Technical Director
* Develop/Update Health Safety Security and Environmental management requirements for the P\project delivery phase including HSSE Reviews, co-ordinate with HSE and Security Managers
* Develop/Update Sustainability management requirements for the delivery phase. co-ordinate with Sustainability Managers
* Develop and update Health, Safety, Security, and Environmental (HSSE) management requirements for the construction and delivery phases, including site HSSE governance, audits, and reviews, in coordination with HSE and Security Managers
* Ensure quality management systems are implemented and enforced during construction, including inspections, testing, defect management, and handover requirements
* Support MMC Director in establishing and overall MMC strategy and delivery integration process for all delivery models
* Support the Procurement Director in establishing contractor, supplier, and construction service requirements and standards for prequalification and RFP processes
* Support HQ Executive director in presentations and submittal for business line, project and budget approvals
* Accountable for delivery of special HQ projects including all approvals, reporting, management of internal and external stakeholders, financial closure and handover
* Accountable for compliance of special/assigned HQ projects with all QDC policies, processes, procedures and requirements, ensuring that the project meets HSE, budget, schedule and quality standards and requirements
* Support BUs in project delivery with peer reviews, consultant selection and management (when required), project audits to ensure compliance with established processes, procedures and standards for delivery and consultancy (including PMC)
* Support BUs with delivery peer reviews, construction management audits, contractor performance reviews, and resolution of complex delivery and site execution issues
* Coordinates input from BUs on the HQ management and governance framework processes and standards, updates documentation as part of the continuous improvement cycle
* Leads/support preparation of training materials required for the implementation of policies, processes and procedures, participates in training or presentations when required
* Participates in QDC Mentoring and Capability Building programs

Applications closing on 22nd April 2026.
  
  
**Requirements**
**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in architecture or engineering is minimum
* Master's Degree in related fields is preferred

**Specific Skills Required**

* Significant experience (5+ years) in KSA within large‑scale developments or giga‑projects
* Thorough knowledge of procurement governance, strategic sourcing, and supply chain management principles
* Proven experience establishing procurement frameworks, policies, and assurance models for complex, multi‑project programs
* Strong understanding of multiple delivery models, including Self‑Delivery, Construction Management, Delivery Partner, and Traditional contracting
* Demonstrated experience in strategic and long‑lead procurement, market engagement, and supplier capacity management
* Proven leadership in providing central functional procurement services to internal BUs and senior stakeholders
* Strong stakeholder management skills across executive leadership, project teams, CPU, consultants, contractors, and suppliers
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen
* Strong problem‑solving and risk management capability
* Excellent time management and ability to operate effectively under pressure

**Experience**

* 25 years' experience, of which at least 5 years must be in a senior leadership role overseeing construction delivery or project execution within large programs or the consulting / delivery industry

**Benefits**
Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.raw_snippet:

Senior Project Manager

**Company:**

**Job Summary:**

We are seeking an experienced Project Management with a background in computer science or related field to oversee the planning, coordination, and execution of our technology projec
data.jd_text:
**Job Title:**

Senior Project Manager

**Company:**
HAD – Comunications and Information Technology

**Job Summary:**

We are seeking an experienced Project Management with a background in computer science or related field to oversee the planning, coordination, and execution of our technology projects. As a Senior Project Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring the successful delivery of projects within scope, budget, and timeline. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including software developers, engineers, designers, and stakeholders, to drive project progress and achieve desired outcomes.

**Responsibilities:**

**-Project Planning and Execution:**

* Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
* Develop detailed project plans, including timelines, resource allocation, and budget estimates.
* Coordinate and manage project activities, ensuring adherence to timelines and quality standards.
* Monitor project progress, identify risks, and proactively implement mitigation strategies.
* Facilitate effective communication and collaboration among project team members.

**-Stakeholder Management:**

* Engage and communicate with project stakeholders, providing regular updates on project status.
* Manage expectations, address concerns, and negotiate project priorities and deliverables.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define project requirements, ensuring alignment with business goals.

**-Team Leadership:**

* Lead and motivate project teams, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.
* Assign tasks, provide guidance, and monitor individual and team performance.
* Facilitate effective decision-making, conflict resolution, and problem-solving within the team.

**-Risk Management:**

* Identify project risks, assess their potential impact, and develop risk mitigation plans.
* Proactively address issues and obstacles that may impact project progress or outcomes.
* Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory requirements and security standards.

**-Quality Assurance:**

* Implement quality assurance processes to monitor and ensure the delivery of high-quality software solutions.
* Conduct project reviews and post-implementation evaluations to identify areas for improvement.
* Drive continuous process improvement initiatives to enhance project management methodologies.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in computer science or a related field.
* **3 – 5 years of practical experience**
  in Project management.
* Proven experience as a Project Manager.
* Strong understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and project management methodologies.
* Proficiency in project management tools and software (e.g., JIRA, Trello, ClickUp, MIRO).
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to effectively manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
* PMP or other project management certifications are a plus.

The Senior Director provides leadership in establishing and maintaining design and consultancy management framework, governance and operating model for QDC HQ team. Ensures the design processes are developed and rolled out to all Business units / sectors, supports delivery in BUs when required. Provides leadership for assigned HQ special projects accountable for meeting quality, time, budget and HSSE requirements.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establish/update design and project management framework for all delivery methods (including Self-Delivery, Delivery partner, CM, traditional etc.)
* Develop / update policies, processes, procedures, manuals and templates for design and consultancy (including PMC) for all projects and delivery methods
* Define governance process including detailed RACI matrix for all projects for Stages
* Support / coordinate with HQ Operations Director and Project Director (Delivery) in establishing governance and operational model for the complete program lifecycle
* Develop Design Strategy requirements and template to be applied for all projects and delivery methods
* Coordinate Technical / Peer review design management process and requirements with the Technical Director
* Develop/Update Health Safety Security and Environmental management requirements for the design phase including Design HSSE Reviews, co-ordinate with HSE and Security Managers
* Develop/Update Sustainability management requirements for the design phase. co-ordinate with Sustainability Managers
* Support MMC Director in establishing and overall MMC strategy and design integration process for all delivery models
* Support Procurement Director in establishing design and consultancy requirements and standards for prequalification and RFP processes. Participate when required in consultant selection process
* Support HQ Executive director in presentations and submittal for business line, project and budget approvals
* Accountable for delivery of special/assigned HQ projects including all approvals, reporting, management of internal and external stakeholders, financial closure and handover
* Accountable for compliance of special/assigned HQ projects with all QDC policies, processes, procedures and requirements, ensuring that the project meets HSE, budget, schedule and quality standards and requirements
* Support Business units in project delivery with peer reviews, consultant selection and management (when required), project audits to ensure compliance with established processes, procedures and standards for design and consultancy (including PMC)
* Coordinates input from Business units on the HQ management and governance framework processes and standards, updates documentation as part of the continuous improvement cycle
* Leads/support preparation of training materials required for the implementation of policies, processes and procedures, participates in training or presentations when required
* Participates in QDC Mentoring and Capability Building programs

Applications closing on 22nd April 2026.
  
  
**Requirements**
**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in architecture or engineering as minimum
* Master's Degree in related fields is preferred

**Specific Skills Required**

* Significant experience (5+ years) in KSA within large‑scale developments or giga‑projects
* Thorough knowledge of procurement governance, strategic sourcing, and supply chain management principles
* Proven experience establishing procurement frameworks, policies, and assurance models for complex, multi‑project programs
* Strong understanding of multiple delivery models, including Self‑Delivery, Construction Management, Delivery Partner, and Traditional contracting
* Demonstrated experience in strategic and long‑lead procurement, market engagement, and supplier capacity management
* Proven leadership in providing central functional procurement services to internal Business Units and senior stakeholders
* Strong stakeholder management skills across executive leadership, project teams, CPU, consultants, contractors, and suppliers
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen
* Strong problem‑solving and risk management capability
* Excellent time management and ability to operate effectively under pressure

**Experience**

* 20-25 years' experience, of which at least 5 years have been in a senior leadership role within procurement, commercial, or supply chain functions on major programs or large‑scale developments

**Benefits**
Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.jd_text:
**Job Title:**
**Project Engineering & Delivery Manager**
**Experience Required:**
Minimum 10 years
  
  
**Location:**
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
  
  
**Employment Type:**
Full-time
  
  
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced
**Project Engineering & Delivery Manager**
specializing in
**SCADA (Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition), DMS (Distribution Management System), and EMS (Energy Management System)**
. The Project Engineering & Delivery Manager is responsible for leading both the technical engineering aspects and overall delivery of complex projects. This role combines strong engineering expertise with delivery management to ensure projects are executed with technical accuracy, delivered on time, within budget, and meet customer expectations. The position requires leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and strong client engagement skills.
  
  
The Project Engineering & Delivery Manager cultivates relationships with a portfolio of customers in both Pre-sales and project delivery phases and provides objective advice and assistance on the strategy, structure, management and operations of a customer organization, in support of identified business purposes and objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage engineering, design, integration, implementation and delivery of SCADA, DMS, and EMS projects from inception to delivery.
* Coordinate with clients, stakeholders, and internal teams to understand requirements, scope, and project deliverables.
* Prepare detailed project plans, schedules, and resource allocation to meet deadlines and budgets.
* Oversee system architecture, hardware, and software integration ensuring compliance with industry standards and safety regulations.
* Monitor and control project progress, conduct risk assessments, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Perform design reviews, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis for technical issues.
* Ensure quality assurance and testing protocols are followed during deployment phases.
* Mentor and guide a team of engineers, providing technical direction and fostering skill development.
* Manage documentation including design reports, test plans, project reports, and client communications.
* Support commissioning, training, and post-deployment troubleshooting.
* Drive process improvements and innovation by staying updated on the latest technologies and industry trends.
* Respond to all client inquiries, bugs, and product ideas for in-flight projects and file tickets for the OEM/Partners.
* Perform use case and client specific testing runs and lead factory and site acceptance testing.
* Report on project outcomes and present findings to project partners and stakeholders

**Additional Responsibilities**

* Technical Leadership of the delivery and implementation of large complex solutions.
* Analyse, define and prioritize Business and Functional requirements and processes and propose technical solutions to meet the business issues and close inefficiency gaps.
* Responsibility for the Business requirements through the entire lifecycle of the project from definition, implementation, test and delivery.
* Create and maintain relationships with key decision makers, stakeholders and 3rd Parties.
* Participate & lead technical requirements workshops.
* Prepare Technical Solutions for Utility Tenders.
* Write and present technical proposals and presentations.
* Ability to take ownership of issues and get them resolved using self-driven initiative

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, or related Engineering discipline.
* Minimum 10 years of experience in engineering management for SCADA, DMS, EMS, or similar utility automation systems.
* Proven experience in large-scale power grid projects or distribution network automation.
* Strong knowledge of protocols such as IEC 104, IEC 61850, Modbus, DNP3, OPC, etc.
* Experience with network architecture, cybersecurity best practices, and data communication systems.
* Proficiency in system simulation tools and project management software (MS Project, Primavera, etc.).
* Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making skills.
* Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal abilities.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
* Willingness to travel and work on-site at project locations.

**Preferred Skills**

* Utility integration experience (E.g. SCADA, ADMS, OT, OMS etc.).
* DevOps hands on experience.
* Cybersecurity hands on experience
* Familiarity with regulatory standards and safety compliance requirements.
* Ability to work with cross-cultural teams and diverse stakeholders.

data.title: Project Manager (EOI)
data.raw_snippet:
Jasara PMC is actively searching for an experienced and dynamic Project Manager - Sports Facilities (Expression of Interest) to lead and oversee the rehabilitation and development of sports facilities project.
  
  
We are partnering with a reputable institution to deliver high‑profile sports and re
data.jd_text:
Jasara PMC is actively searching for an experienced and dynamic Project Manager - Sports Facilities (Expression of Interest) to lead and oversee the rehabilitation and development of sports facilities project.
  
  
We are partnering with a reputable institution to deliver high‑profile sports and recreational facilities in Riyadh. This initiative will create a state‑of‑the‑art, refurbished and upgraded complex designed to provide high‑quality accommodation and amenities for sport and leisure—aligned with the project's primary objectives. The project team will apply proven project management and construction‑supervision expertise to ensure on‑time delivery, strict cost control, and adherence to the highest quality and safety standards. We seek an exceptional, collaborative team committed to excellence and ready to contribute the skills and dedication required to deliver this scheme successfully.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Plan, manage, and monitor the rehabilitation and development of sports facilities project, ensuring adherence to project scope, timelines, and budgets
* Coordinate and lead cross-functional teams, including design, engineering, and construction professionals
* Engage with clients, consultants, contractors, and stakeholders to understand and fulfill project requirements
* Monitor project risks and challenges, implementing effective mitigation strategies
* Ensure compliance with relevant health, safety, and quality standards and local regulations
* Prepare and present regular project status reports to stakeholders and senior management
* Drive continuous improvement and innovation within sports facilities project delivery

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, Project Management, or a related field
* 15 years of proven experience as a Project Manager, preferably with a focus on sports facilities or related infrastructure projects
* Strong knowledge of sports facility design, construction processes, and relevant standards
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to manage multiple projects and work under pressure to meet deadlines
* Experience with project management software and tools
* Familiarity with health, safety, and quality management in construction projects
* Ability to foster collaboration among diverse teams
* Professional certification in project management (e.g., PMP) is desirable

**Benefits**

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing organization
* Be part of a collaborative and supportive team

data.title: Senior Director - Project Management Sports Bu - Interface SPA 250
data.raw_snippet: Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an experienced and dynamic Senior Director - Project Management, Sports BU - Interface to lead and oversee the successful delivery of sports-related projects within the organization. This critical leadership role involves managing complex interfaces between vari
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an experienced and dynamic Senior Director - Project Management, Sports BU - Interface to lead and oversee the successful delivery of sports-related projects within the organization. This critical leadership role involves managing complex interfaces between various project teams, stakeholders, and business units to ensure seamless execution and integration of sports infrastructure and facilities.
  
  
The Senior Director will be responsible for driving strategic project management initiatives, coordinating cross-functional teams, mitigating risks, and ensuring that all sports projects meet Qiddiya's quality, cost, and schedule objectives.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage the Project Management function for the Sports Business Unit, focusing on interface management between different project teams and stakeholders
* Develop and implement project management strategies, policies, and procedures that enhance coordination and integration across projects
* Ensure effective communication and collaboration among all parties to deliver projects on time, within scope, and budget
* Identify, assess, and mitigate risks related to project interfaces and dependencies
* Monitor project progress, quality, and compliance with contractual and regulatory requirements
* Manage relationships with internal and external stakeholders, including contractors, consultants, vendors, and government entities
* Drive continuous improvement in project delivery through lessons learned, best practices, and adoption of new technologies
* Provide leadership, guidance, and mentorship to project management teams to build strong capabilities and high performance
* Report regularly to senior leadership on project status, challenges, and recommendations

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a related field; advanced degree or PMP certification preferred
* Minimum of 15 years of project management experience, with at least 8 years in a senior leadership role managing complex sports, entertainment, or infrastructure projects
* Proven expertise in managing interface and integration challenges between multiple projects and business units
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and best practices
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working in large-scale, multi-disciplinary projects, preferably within the sports or entertainment sectors
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
* Fluency in English; knowledge of Arabic is a plus

**Benefits**
Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.title: Project Planning & Control Manager (WET IC)
data.raw_snippet:
****Planning and Scheduling****

* Develop, update, and maintain detailed project schedules (engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning) using Primavera P6 or equivalent tools.
* Prepare and maintain the Project Execution Plan (PEP), ensuring integration of scope, schedule, and cost basel
data.jd_text:
****Planning and Scheduling****

* Develop, update, and maintain detailed project schedules (engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning) using Primavera P6 or equivalent tools.
* Prepare and maintain the Project Execution Plan (PEP), ensuring integration of scope, schedule, and cost baselines.
* Coordinate with engineering, procurement, and construction teams to ensure accurate progress updates and schedule forecasts.
* Identify schedule deviations, analyze their impact, and propose corrective actions to maintain project timelines.
* Develop key performance indicators (KPIs) and milestone tracking tools for management reporting.

****2. Cost Control and Reporting****

* Establish and maintain project cost control systems, budgets, and forecasts.
* Track actual expenditures against budgets and report cost variances, trends, and performance indices (CPI, SPI).
* Support the preparation of monthly project progress reports, highlighting schedule and cost performance, risk areas, and recovery plans.
* Interface with finance and procurement to ensure accurate cash flow projections and payment schedules.

****3. Risk and Change Management****

* Support risk identification, quantification, and mitigation planning in collaboration with project teams.
* Evaluate the impact of change orders and variations on project schedule and cost baselines.
* Maintain change management logs and ensure proper documentation and approval processes are followed.

****4. Coordination and Interface****

* Liaise with client representatives to ensure alignment on progress measurement and reporting formats.
* Coordinate internally with engineering, procurement, and construction departments for data collection and progress validation.
* Participate in progress review meetings and prepare presentation materials for management and clients.

****5. Documentation and Compliance****

* Ensure all project control documents, reports, and procedures are properly maintained and compliant with company standards and project requirements.
* Contribute to lessons learned and project closeout documentation for continuous improvement.

data.title: Work Winning Project Manager (Aviation)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Work Winning Project Manager with an Aviation focus to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This role plays a critical part in securing new aviation sector opportunities by managing the full work-winning lifecycle — from early opport
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Work Winning Project Manager with an Aviation focus to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This role plays a critical part in securing new aviation sector opportunities by managing the full work-winning lifecycle — from early opportunity identification through to successful bid submission and commercial close.
  
  
The Aviation Work Winning Project Manager manages the entire lifecycle of aviation sector prospects — from Expression of Interest through proposal development, submission, and commercial negotiation. They coordinate technical, financial, and strategic inputs to produce high-quality, competitive submissions. The role ensures alignment with aviation sector strategy, client expectations, and internal governance, while also tracking pipeline performance and supporting sector leadership in securing new aviation opportunities.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Work Winning & Bid Management**

* Manage end-to-end EOI, prequalification, and tender submissions for aviation sector opportunities.
* Develop and implement bid strategies aligned with sector priorities, client drivers, and competitive positioning.
* Lead proposal planning, scheduling, and governance reviews to ensure timely and compliant submissions.

**Stakeholder & Input Coordination**

* Coordinate inputs from technical leads, commercial teams, finance, legal, and leadership to produce cohesive submissions.
* Facilitate bid workshops, strategy sessions, and reviews with senior stakeholders.
* Act as the central point of contact for all bid-related communications and actions.

**Commercial & Quality Oversight**

* Support development of commercial models, pricing strategies, and risk assessments in collaboration with finance and leadership.
* Ensure proposals meet client requirements, internal quality standards, and governance approvals.
* Drive clarity, consistency, and high presentation standards across all submission documents.

**Pipeline & Strategy Support**

* Maintain oversight of the aviation opportunity pipeline, tracking bid status, win/loss outcomes, and key metrics.
* Provide regular pipeline updates, dashboards, and insights to Aviation Sector Leadership.
* Support post-bid reviews, lessons learned, and continuous improvement of work-winning processes.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, Business, or a related discipline.
* 10+ years’ experience in work winning, bid management, or business development within the aviation or infrastructure sector.
* Proven track record of managing complex, multi-disciplinary bids from EOI through to contract award.
* Experience working within consultancy / professional services environments (Middle East experience strongly preferred).

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong understanding of aviation clients, procurement models, and tendering processes.
* Excellent stakeholder management, coordination, and communication skills.
* Strong commercial awareness and ability to manage competing priorities under tight deadlines.
* High attention to detail with strong written and presentation skills.
