data.raw_snippet:
**Position Summary:**

Responsible for monitoring and supervising assigned construction project(s) on a daily basis throughout various project phases, including coordination, progress review, quality control, work scheduling, outage requirements, safety compliance, testing and commissioning, and pro
data.jd_text:
**Position Summary:**

Responsible for monitoring and supervising assigned construction project(s) on a daily basis throughout various project phases, including coordination, progress review, quality control, work scheduling, outage requirements, safety compliance, testing and commissioning, and processing contractors’ invoices. The role requires solid experience in EHV/HV project management and construction activities related to Substations, Underground Cables, Overhead Transmission Lines, Civil, Electro-Mechanical, and Protection works.

**Duties and Responsibilities:**

* Monitor and supervise assigned construction project(s) on a daily basis throughout various project phases.
* Establish project and quality control procedures.
* Prepare and monitor work schedules.
* Identify outage requirements.
* Coordinate with contractors and SEC departments.
* Review project progress.
* Review design drawings, materials, and submittals.
* Ensure compliance with Safety and Loss Prevention requirements.
* Witness testing and commissioning activities.
* Process contractors’ invoices.

**Technical Knowledge:**

* Thorough knowledge of EHV/HV project management and construction activities related to Substations, Underground Cables, Overhead Transmission Lines, Civil, Electro-Mechanical, and Protection works.

**Minimum Qualifications and Experience:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Electrical, Civil, or Mechanical Engineering.
* Minimum twelve (12) years of experience, including at least six (6) years as a
  **Site Manager**
  in a large power utility company in EHV/HV project management and construction activities related to Substations, Underground Cables, Overhead Transmission Lines, Civil, Electro-Mechanical, and Protection works.
* For Saudi nationals: minimum six (6) years of experience, including at least three (3) years as a Site Manager.
* Professional certification in project management or a related discipline is preferred.

data.title: Senior Commercial Project Manager - Saudi Arabia/Riyadh
data.raw_snippet:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
  
  
Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant’s i
data.jd_text:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
  
  
Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant’s intuitive buildings which are comfortable, safe, secure and energy efficient.
  
  
Smart infrastructure from Siemens intelligently connects energy systems, buildings and industries to adapt and evolve the way we live and work. We work together with customers and partners to build an ecosystem that intuitively responds to the needs of people and helps customers to better use resources. It helps our customers to thrive, communities to progress and supports sustainable development.
  
  
Join our Smart Infrastructure Buildings division as Senior Commercial Project Manager – and help us re-imagine the world by finding solutions and making the world a smarter place for tomorrow.
  
  
**Your Role – International, Challenging And Future-Oriented!**

* Perform Commercial Project Management activities and tasks for the assigned Projects Portfolio.
* Drive end to end commercial execution, business performance planning and ensure alignment of portfolio performance with organization goals.
* Oversight of commercial execution across projects and contracts, ensuring alignment with KPIs (Revenue, Billing Plans, Cashflow and Margins)
* Contract & Claim management with clients and subcontractors
* Driving & monitoring of project KPIs (Revenues, Cashflows, Billing Plans etc.)
* Ongoing project Performance Monitoring (calculation and plan vs actual deviations)
* Ensuring timely cleanup of balance sheet and aging commitments costs
* Evaluation of Risks & Opportunities, risk mitigations and reporting
* Monitoring and evaluation of plan, actual & committed costs, and identification & corrections of discrepancies
* Processing of purchase orders, sales orders, debit & credit notes, and invoicing in SAP
* Bills verification with reference to agreed terms & conditions
* Maintaining progress & payment records of subcontractors
* Follow up of accounts receivable
* Ensuring compliance of policies & procedure of documentation required for smooth processing of subcontractors' payments
* Coordination with treasury for bonds, guarantees, letter of credits etc
* Planning & monitoring of procurements and equipment shipping schedules

**Your Qualifications And Skills – Digital And Solid!**

* Minimum Graduation in Accounting, Finance or Relevant Fields
* Minimum 7 Years, Past Siemens experience is a big plus
* Good understanding of IFRS, FRG, Accounting Standards
* Experience in SAP is must
* CPM@Siemens certification is a plus
* Excellent Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Ability to work under high pressure with very close deadlines
* Fluency in English & Arabic

**What else do you need to know?**
As a world leader in developing and producing the most advanced engineering technologies, we improve lives and further human achievements worldwide, while also protecting the climate - all thanks to our employees. Working with us, you have the foundation to develop personally and professionally. We give you the chance to do something significant, that benefits society and human progress. We give you the chance to create a difference.
  
  
Diversity at Siemens is our source of creativity and innovation. Having different types of talent and experiences makes us more ambitious and better prepared to respond successfully to the demands of the Society. Therefore, we value the candidates that reflect the Diversity that we enjoy in our Company. Please find more information at www.siemens.com
  
  
At Siemens we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow‘s reality. Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here: www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds
  
  
We are looking forward to receiving your online application.
  
  
Please note: Only complete applications can be considered in the selection process.

data.title: KSA B&I Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Location -**
Al Khobar/Riyadh
  
  
**Role Overview**
The KSA Buildings & Infrastructure (B&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑ter
data.jd_text:
**Location -**
Al Khobar/Riyadh
  
  
**Role Overview**
The KSA Buildings & Infrastructure (B&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑term vision, delivering the annual P&L, and ensuring excellence across all operations.
  
  
The Director drives topline and gross margin delivery in close partnership with regional leadership, steering commercial strategy, optimizing delivery models, and ensuring high‑quality, efficient, and client‑centric execution. The role leads multidisciplinary teams across
**Asset Management, Infrastructure Technical Inspections, Project & Program Management, Environmental Services, and Commissioning**
, ensuring cohesive, high‑value solutions for clients.
  
  
The Director also strengthens BV’s market presence across major sectors including
**Hospitality, Entertainment, Tourism, Mega Projects, Developers, Contractors, Government Authorities, Urban Development, Smart Cities, Transportation Infrastructure, and Aviation**
, building trusted relationships and expanding BV’s impact on safe, sustainable, and resilient built environments.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and implement the regional B&I growth strategy aligned with regional and global Product Line priorities.
* Drive portfolio expansion, commercial performance, and market penetration across all B&I service domains.
* Lead the annual budgeting cycle and manage end‑to‑end P&L accountability for revenue, sales, and gross margin.
* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.

**Core Competencies**
**Leadership & Strategy**

* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.

**Commercial & Client Excellence**

* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.

**Operational Excellence**

* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.

**Technical & Market Insight**

* Solid understanding of B&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.

**Personal Attributes**

* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.

**Core Competencies**
**Leadership & Strategy**

* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.

**Commercial & Client Excellence**

* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.

**Operational Excellence**

* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.

**Technical & Market Insight**

* Solid understanding of B&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.

**Personal Attributes**

* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
The Project Director will provide executive leadership for the end‑to‑end delivery of a major project under a PMC (Project Management Consultancy) model. This role oversees program and project management governance, directs multidisciplinary teams, ensures EPC contractor compliance,
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
The Project Director will provide executive leadership for the end‑to‑end delivery of a major project under a PMC (Project Management Consultancy) model. This role oversees program and project management governance, directs multidisciplinary teams, ensures EPC contractor compliance, and drives project performance across all phases. The Project Director will establish and implement project management policies, procedures, and systems while maintaining rigorous oversight of schedules, budgets, quality, safety, and risk. This position is responsible for ensuring that all deliverables meet the project objectives and international best‑practice standards.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
****Program & Project Management Leadership****

* Develop and oversee the implementation of program/project management policies, procedures, methodologies, and best practices
* Assess capacity and capability needs for successful PMC delivery and recommend improvements
* Provide daily leadership, guidance, and direction to the PMC team across all disciplines

****Systems & Controls****

* Oversee the development, configuration, and deployment of Program Management Information Systems (PMIS) across the project
* Ensure robust project controls are in place, including cost, schedule, risk, and quality systems

****Performance Oversight****

* Lead regular project review meetings to monitor performance, identify issues, and drive corrective actions
* Prepare and present weekly and monthly project status reports for internal and external stakeholders
* Continuously evaluate EPC contractor performance to ensure compliance with approved execution plans, procedures, and contract requirements

****Deliverable Management****

* Ensure an approved, comprehensive list of project deliverables is established and maintained
* Monitor deliverable issuance to ensure timely submission, multidisciplinary review, and prompt return of comments
* Verify that the EPC contractor's plans and procedures are adequate and effectively support project delivery

****Stakeholder & Interface Management****

* Manage communication and coordination between the client, EPC contractor, consultants, and PMC teams
* Ensure issues are escalated and resolved efficiently to maintain progress and alignment

**Qualifications & Requirements**
****Education****

* MSc/BSc in Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related field
* Highly preferred: Chartered Engineer (CEng or equivalent)

****Experience****

* 20+ years of experience in large-scale construction and development projects
* Solid background working within PMC environments
* Proven experience in:

+ High-end residential projects
+ Commercial buildings
+ Mosques
+ Parking structures
+ Roads and highways
+ Infrastructure
+ Mixed-use developments

****Competencies****

* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of project controls, PMIS, and international standards
* Proven ability to manage EPC contractors on complex, multidisciplinary projects

data.jd_text:
HanmiGlobal Saudi is seeking an experienced and dedicated
**Project Manager**
to lead our project initiatives to successful completion. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in project management within the construction sector, with a proven ability to deliver projects on time and within budget. As a Project Manager, you will oversee the entire project lifecycle, from inception through planning and execution, ensuring all project objectives align with client requirements and organizational goals.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Plan, execute, and oversee multiple projects, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards
* Develop comprehensive project plans, including scope, schedules, resource allocation, and risk management strategies
* Lead project teams, provide direction, and motivate members to achieve project goals
* Maintain continuous communication with clients, stakeholders, and team members, providing updates on project status and addressing concerns promptly
* Identify potential risks and develop mitigation strategies to ensure project success
* Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements and company policies throughout the project lifecycle
* Conduct regular project reviews and prepare reports for senior management

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in project management, with at least 5 years in a managerial role within the construction industry
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is preferred
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and software
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Proficient in budget management and forecasting.

At WSP, you can access our global scale, contribute to landmark projects and connect with the brightest minds in your field to do the best work of your life. You can embrace your curiosity in a culture that celebrates new ideas and diverse perspectives. You can experience a world of opportunity and the chance to shape a career as unique as you.
  
  
We are seeking Project/Development Management professionals for a project based in Riyadh to support the Planning & Oversight department. This role will provide direct support by contributing hands‑on project delivery capability across multiple initiatives. Individuals should have strong experience working on projects of varying scales from inception through completion, with the ability to navigate project processes, documentation, and coordination requirements confidently.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Assist in preparation of project development strategy including project purpose & objectives, project implementation, project design & delivery plan, procurement, schedule and budget.
* Assist the Development director in Preparation reports and presentations as required.
* Support the project planning, coordination, budgeting and cashflow.
* Interpret project scope and constrains, plan the overall workflow stages and breakdown and provide timeline schedules accordingly.
* Support to establish and challenge the project Cost Estimates in accordance with the requirement for the development stage of the project.
* Monitor budgets, forecast and cost plans throughout the project lifecycle.
* Communicate and coordinate with cross functional the status and updates of stakeholders to inform the decisions.

* Identify, assess, track and report on project risks and establish and implement mitigation strategies.
* Ensure the project procurement requirements are established and adhered to allowing the project to progress in accordance with the project implementation timeline. Participate in procurement activities as required.
* Support commercial processes as required.
* Monitor and control the consultants and contractor performance and progress and conduct coordination meetings with the related team for problem resolutions.
* Maintain accurate project documentation in accordance with company requirements including confidentiality. Collate project data and issue as required.
* Conduct a comprehensive benchmark analysis of comparable project locally and internationally
* Provide recommendation on product differentiation, quality standard and benchmark driven project features

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering /Architecture.
* 8-12 Years of experience in Development / Project Management role.
* Experience in delivering projects KSA.
* Experience in projects from concept design through to execution.
* Worked client side through past experience.
* Proven ability to manage multiple large projects simultaneously.
* Proven ability to manage multiple internal and external stakeholders
* Strong organizational, presentation and communication skills.
* Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint and other relevant software.
* PMP or similar Certification is an advantage.
* Commercial acumen and negotiation skills
* Problem solving, risk management and supporting decision making

**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
Join our close-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
  
  
**With us, you can. Apply today.**

data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking an accomplished Senior Project Controls Manager to lead our project controls team and drive the successful delivery of complex infrastructure projects. The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in project planning, cost control, schedule management, and risk mitigation, ensuring projects are completed efficiently and in alignment with client objectives.
  
  
As a key leader within JASARA PMC, you will collaborate closely with multidisciplinary teams to develop and implement robust project control strategies. Your insights and leadership will be instrumental in maintaining project integrity and optimizing resource allocation.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Develop, implement, and maintain project controls frameworks and processes
* Establish project baselines and monitor progress against schedule, scope, and budget
* Prepare comprehensive reports detailing project status, forecasts, and performance metrics
* Assess risks and develop mitigation plans to ensure project continuity
* Coordinate with project managers, engineers, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure alignment and timely communication
* Coach and mentor project controls personnel to foster professional growth
* Ensure adherence to industry standards and company policies

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline
* Over 18 years of experience in project controls, with at least 5 years in a senior managerial role
* Proficient in project management software such as Primavera P6, MS Project, Aconex and cost control tools
* Strong knowledge of project management principles, cost estimating, scheduling, and risk management
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Ability to analyze complex project data and make informed decisions
* Experience working in luxury hospitality or mixed use or construction projects preferred

data.raw_snippet:

data.jd_text:
**About Flat6Labs**
Flat6Labs is the leading entrepreneurship platform in emerging markets, empowering entrepreneurs to build, launch, and grow transformative ideas through acceleration programs, ecosystem development, and tailored innovation services.
  
  
For more information, visit www.flat6labs.com.
  
  
**About The Role**
The
**Flat6Labs Program Manager | KSA**
oversees the operations and processes of the program's startups, designing and implementing effective business strategies to position the program as a high-quality, leading ecosystem development initiative both locally and internationally. The role focuses on building relationships, establishing partnerships with local and international stakeholders, and ensuring program excellence.
  
  
The Program Manager is also responsible for managing the program team, leading the startup selection process, and tracking the progress of participating startups, while providing both virtual and on-ground support when required.
  
  
**This is a one-year contract role based in KSA.**
**Main Responsibilities:**

* Develop, drive, and implement the program strategy and cycles.
* Establish effective project management and monitoring mechanisms to ensure timely delivery.
* Provide periodic progress reports to management.
* Ensure the Flat6Labs process is followed and well communicated to all team members.
* Identify partnership opportunities and oversee the establishment of local and international collaborations.
* Manage the program budget and supervise financial control of spending and procurement.
* Build and maintain a network of support partners, including financial, non-financial, and development agencies.
* Define business objectives and goals in coordination with management and ensure their successful execution.
* Report program and startup status to key stakeholders in a timely manner.
* Effectively manage the program team, foster collaboration, and ensure orientation on Flat6Labs processes.
* Strengthen engagement with the local startup ecosystem by building partnerships and sourcing entrepreneurs in coordination with the Marketing team.
* Collaborate with Marketing to ensure the program and its events are well promoted locally and to maximize outreach to potential entrepreneurs.
* Build and sustain strong relationships within the regional entrepreneurial community.
* Lead and coordinate the full startup selection process, from application review to filtration, interviews, bootcamp shortlisting, and final Selection Committee presentations.
* Oversee training and mentorship programs, and recruit high-quality mentors, trainers, and speakers.
* Manage and coordinate the online platform with internal and external teams, ensuring smooth setup of content, curriculum, CRM, and interface.
* Set goals and milestones for startups and monitor their progress closely.
* Support startups in structuring and refining their investor pitches and presentations.
* Nominate high-potential startups for follow-on funding opportunities.
* Supervise the planning and logistics of all program events, including preparing invitee lists and coordinating with potential investors and guests

**Requirements**

* Minimum 6-8 years of experience in entrepreneurship, operations or business management
* Bachelor's Degree in business management or related discipline
* Excellent English & Arabic language skills.
* Excellent communication skills
* Proactive and highly organized, with strong time management and planning skills
* Excellent command of productivity software, presentation, word processing & number tools
* High attention to detail
* Highly energetic
* Strong Work Ethic

**Benefits**

* Get the chance to work with high potential for growth startups and bright entrepreneurs in the MENA region and from diﬀerent countries around the world
* Exposure to diﬀerent local, regional and international investors and VCs
* Engage in the buzzing startup community in the MENA region
* Work in an environment supporting creativity and proactivity, and be a part of a small dynamic team

Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a highly skilled Director of Operational Readiness to lead the planning, coordination, and execution of operational strategies for large-scale entertainment and cultural developments. This role is integral to ensuring that all new projects are fully prepared for launch with efficient operations, well-trained staff, and superior customer experiences, aligning with the company's vision to create a world-class destination.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Lead the development and delivery of training programs to prepare operational teams and support staff

* Engage with stakeholders and partners to maintain alignment with strategic objectives and operational standards
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives based on readiness metrics and feedback

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, Hospitality, or a related discipline; Master's degree preferred
* Minimum of 8 years of progressive experience in operational readiness or operations management, ideally within the entertainment, hospitality, or large infrastructure projects
* Proven leadership capabilities in managing multi-disciplinary teams and complex project environments
* Strong analytical skills with experience in readiness assessment, risk management, and process optimization
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills at all organizational levels
* Demonstrated ability to develop effective training programs and foster staff readiness
* Knowledge of relevant regulatory standards and industry best practices
* Familiarity with the Saudi market and cultural context is an advantage

**Benefits**
Comprehensive benefits package

data.title: Retail Project Manager - KSA
data.raw_snippet:
**What Will Be Your Mission**
We are looking for a dynamic and structured Retail Project Manager to join the Cartier KSA team based in Riyadh and reporting to the Area Sales Manager. This role is dedicated to support commercial performance and drive boutique network development by leading strategic
data.jd_text:
**What Will Be Your Mission**
We are looking for a dynamic and structured Retail Project Manager to join the Cartier KSA team based in Riyadh and reporting to the Area Sales Manager. This role is dedicated to support commercial performance and drive boutique network development by leading strategic projects and provide high-level coordination and reporting.
  
  
The role serves as a critical bridge between executive leadership, cross-functional teams, and day-to-day retail activities.
  
  
**HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT?**
**Special Projects Management**

* Work hand-in-hand with Commercial leadership on the development and execution of detailed projects and workshops related to key priorities.
* Create and execute strategies aligned with business objectives such as Sales Growth or Store Expansions.
* Lead the end-to-end orchestration of new boutique openings, directing cross-functional teams (including Merchandising, Marketing, Supply Chain, and Operations) to align on timelines, budgets, and brand standards.
* Lead projects to improve Boutique flows and the way we operate boutiques. (ie. Floor Management) hand in hand with Area Sales Manager and L&D.
* Manage special initiatives, boutique openings/closings, boutique briefs, network committee preparations, and related projects.

**Network Development & Real Estate Management**

* Oversee real estate aspects including leases follow-up and contract review in collaboration with local and regional teams.

**Daily Coordination: Day-to-Day Support to Area Sales Manager and Boutiques**

* Deliver regular updates, project dashboards, and briefing materials to executive stakeholders in both Cartier and Richemont.
* Develop and deliver high-quality PowerPoint presentations and executive-level communication materials that clearly articulate project goals, insights, and business recommendations.
* Transform complex business information into compelling visual stories to support decision-making at both local and regional levels.
* Facilitate Retail meetings, workshops, and cross-functional working groups with strong narrative structure and clear outcome orientation.
* Prepare materials and minutes for monthly Retail Leadership meetings.
* Assist the Area Sales Manager with ad-hoc tasks, coordinating initiatives, and ensuring boutique managers receive the guidance and resources needed to meet business goals.
* Prepare presentations in assistance with the Area Sales Manager or other managers.
* Coordinate Retail Meetings and Events.

**Performance Reporting and Boutique Action Plan Execution Monitoring (KPIs, Elevation)**

* Ensure the implementation of the Match to Traffic (MTT) schedule mindset in boutiques in partnership with Commercial leadership team.
* Conduct MTT Weekly Analysis on coverage per boutique and provide feedback to Area Sales Manager.
* Perform Retail Team Productivity Monitoring, supporting the Area Sales Manager in making decisions to steer performance (e.g., FTE moves between boutiques).
* Support on Target Setting implementation ensuring monthly consolidations within deadlines set, and monthly reporting of Retail team performance vs. Commercial targets.
* Follow up, review and report to the Area Sales Manager on Boutique Monthly reports (e.g., team performance touch base, boutique performance rituals and action plan, consignments, gratuities and discounts if any).
* Consolidate commercial, marketing, and finance data to produce regular business reviews to the Area Sales Manager.

**What We Are Looking For**

* Minimum Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in related discipline
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management and/or commercial support roles
* Proven track record in luxury boutique network management, including involvement in new store openings, renovations or relocations.
* Hands on experience in performance monitoring and productivity improvement.
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional projects.
* Entrepreneurial mindset and business acumen
* Excellent analytical skills and understanding of retail productivity levers
* Excellent interpersonal skills to handle both internal and external stakeholders (staff, partners, clients and colleagues)
* Ability to credibly represent the Maison and its core values
* Strategic thinking & problem solving.
* Facilitation & workshop leadership
* Real Estate & Contract coordination
* Executive communication and presentation
* Solid digital skills and interest in new technologies and media
* Knowledge of the watch & jewelry industry is a plus
* International experience is a plus
* Fluency in English and Arabic is a Plus

**What Do We Offer**
At Cartier, we are proud to employ talents from diverse backgrounds, experiences, and identities. We believe that when diversity and inclusion are fully embraced and empowered, creativity and knowledge emerge to deliver excellence. We continue to work towards creating a workforce that represents the diversity of our clients and our communities.
  
  
We offer a dynamic work environment where expertise meets Arts and Culture. We are fully transparent and share with you: Maison strategies, key information, needs of others Corporate Departments.
  
  
We constantly educate you with: Cartier’s savoir-faire, competitive landscape, industry news, client experience best practices. We facilitate career development and evolution in the mid-term within our Maison.
  
  
We develop you with training, continuous learning and encourage a healthy and strong feedback culture, where you will feel encouraged and able to give an honest opinion, as this is essential to us.
  
  
**WHO WE ARE?**
As a place where singularity thrives together, we value the uniqueness of our people, and we see the results of what we do because we are on the journey together. We recognize the richness diversity brings and we embrace a workplace where those differences can be leveraged.
  
  
We offer exciting opportunities to gain experience professionally and personally in a supportive environment which in turn inspires the Cartier creations that become icons in the world of luxury.
  
  
We respect and celebrate the diversity of our people, their backgrounds and experiences and provide equal opportunity for all. We believe that when diversity and inclusion are fully embraced and empowered, creativity and knowledge emerge to deliver excellence. We continue to work towards creating a workforce that represents the diversity of our clients and our communities.
  
  
Quite simply, Cartier is a place like no other. Welcome to our Maison!

data.jd_text:
نبذة عن الوظيفة:

يقوم مدير المشروع بدعم تنفيذ المبادرات والمشاريع ضمن قطاع دعم التنفيذ في مختلف مجالات الأعمال بما يسهم في تحقيق أهداف برنامج تحول القطاع الصحي.

المؤهلات العلمية والعملية المطلوبة:

درجة البكالوريوس في تخصص ذي صلة.

خبرة عملية لا تقل عن 3 سنوات بعد الحصول على درجة البكالوريوس .

إجادة اللغتين العربية والإنجليزية في مجال العمل.

يفضل وجود خبرة عملية أو خلفية دراسية في المجالات التالية:

إدارة المشاريع.

إدارة أصحاب المصلحة/الشركاء.

الإلمام بالقطاع الصحي.

يفضل وجود شهادة احترافية بإدارة المشاريع PMP

المهام والمتطلبات التشغيلية:

تحليل عناصر وأنشطة المشروع وترتيبها ودراسة نطاق المشروع وحجمه، وإعداد الجدول الزمني وترتيب الإجراءات اللازمة.

إعداد الموارد المادية والبشرية اللازمة لتنفيذ المشروع ومتابعة توفيرها في الوقت المناسب.

إعداد ومتابعة جداول التدفق النقدي بما يتناسب مع تسلسل تنفيذ العمليات.

متابعة تقدم التنفيذ الفعلي ومقارنته بالخطة الزمنية المعتمدة ، وإعداد البرامج المعدلة عند الحاجة .

إعداد الوثائق والتقارير المتعلقة بإدارة المشاريع وتقديم التوصيات اوالحلول المناسبة .

توفير تحديثات المشروع على أساس متسق لمختلف أصحاب المصلحة حول الاستراتيجية والتعديلات والتقدم.

دراسة كيفية تحسين آلية العمل المتبعة ورفع معايير الجودة، بما في ذلك بحث طرق جديدة لتنفيذ الأعمال بشكل أفضل.

التواصل الفعال مع أصحاب المصلحة والجهات الخارجية فيما يخدم تنفيذ أهداف البرنامج.

تنفيذ جميع مهام العمل المرتبطة بالمهام الرئيسية، أو المهام التي قد يتم طلبها خارج هذا النطاق حسب الحاجة.

الالتزام بآلية عمل المنهجية الرشيقة المتبعة في البرنامج، عن طريق توفير المساعدة إلى الإدارات أو القطاعات الأخرى حسب الحاجة ضمن مجال خبرة الموظف.

data.jd_text:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
  
  
At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
  
  
**Job Description**
Parsons are looking for a talented and highly motivated
**Project Manager - Development Districts**
to join their team!
  
  
The Project Manager provides oversight to realize execution excellence in the delivery of all phases of detailed design projects under his/her direction. He/she shall be responsible for the technical excellence of the tasks and analyses performed, regulatory compliance, and for on-schedule completion of design projects within or below budget in accordance with contractual obligations.
  
  
**What You’ll Be Doing”**

* Supervise the preparation, design and presentation of high-quality development design drawings and reports.
* Supervise the preparation of technical design packages through to tender and monitor construction quality.
* Liaise with other district Project Managers, Discipline Leads, internal and external team members including master planners, architects, urban designers, specialist designers, all engineering disciplines and quantity surveyors.
* Plan, program and delegate within the team structure and participate in workflow reporting and planning.
* Provide high level liaison with Clients and Client’s representatives.
* Participate in writing technical proposals, estimating levels of effort, work plans, and schedules as required.
* Maintain affiliations with professional societies to keep abreast of development of trends and technologies.

**What Required Skills You’ll Bring**

* Bachelor’s degree in project management, architecture from a recognized university
* Minimum of 10 years’ experience in the masterplan/urban design field showing increasing levels of responsibility
* Experience managing groups for established Architecture/Engineering firms or the client side
* Experience dealing with GCC based municipalities and developers
* Proven leadership and delivery ability
* Excellent English verbal and writing skills

Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
  
  
We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
  
  
Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent-recruitment/.

data.title: Senior Director - Commercial - SDU - 20012792 - CDU8
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procureme
data.jd_text:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procurement and in contract administration. Setting up strategy and execution to the outset through PM/CM specific process and procedures to suit the task at hand whilst fully complying with internal governance and Delegation of Authority. Responsible for driving outturn cost within the agreed business plans and cost plans and feeding back commercial lessons learned and outturn to cost planning.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establish, implement, and maintain the commercial management framework for the Construction Management vertical, covering procurement commercial strategy, contract administration, cost control, and commercial assurance
* Define and embed commercial policies, processes, procedures, manuals, and templates tailored to Project Management / Construction Management delivery models, while ensuring full alignment with QDC governance and Delegation of Authority requirements
* Drive strategic commercial decision‑making across procurement and contract administration, ensuring value for money, appropriate risk allocation, and integration of safety considerations into commercial outcomes
* Lead development of commercial strategies at project and programme level, aligned with approved business plans, cost plans, and delivery strategies
* Provide functional oversight and governance of procurement commercial inputs, including contract strategies, commercial terms, payment mechanisms, incentives, and risk provisions
* Lead and oversee contract administration frameworks, including change control, payment certification, claims management, EOT assessments, dispute avoidance, and close‑out
* Ensure robust cost management, forecasting, and reporting throughout the project lifecycle, driving delivery of final outturn costs within approved budgets
* Monitor commercial performance, risks, and exposures, and implement mitigation strategies in coordination with Delivery, Procurement, Finance, and Risk functions
* Act as the commercial authority within the Construction Management vertical, providing guidance, challenge, and escalation support to project teams in a matrix capacity
* Establish and maintain clear commercial governance checkpoints aligned with stage‑gate approvals and executive decision forums
* Support preparation and review of commercial inputs to Board and N‑1 papers, including cost summaries, risk positions, commercial strategies, and recommendations
* Ensure alignment between cost planning, commercial execution, and outturn performance, and provide structured feedback to cost planning teams on variances, trends, and lessons learned
* Capture, analyse, and disseminate commercial lessons learned, benchmarks, and best practices across the Construction Management vertical and wider QDC organisation
* Support the build‑up and capability development of the Construction Management commercial function, including mentoring, standards setting, and skills development
* Coordinate closely with the Project Director Design, Project Director Delivery, Project Director Procurement, and Finance functions to ensure integrated, end‑to‑end commercial control
* Represent the Construction Management vertical in senior internal and external forums on commercial, contractual, and cost matters, as required

**Requirements**
**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying, Engineering, Construction Management, Commercial Management, or a related discipline (minimum)
* Master's Degree in a related field is preferred

**Specific Skills Required**

* Strong experience in commercial management of large‑scale construction and infrastructure projects, preferably within CM or self‑delivery models
* Deep understanding of procurement commercial strategies and contract administration across multiple delivery models
* Proven ability to establish and operate commercial governance frameworks, controls, and assurance mechanisms
* Strong knowledge of cost planning, budgeting, forecasting, and outturn cost management
* Experience operating within strict governance and Delegation of Authority environments, ideally within giga‑projects
* Ability to embed safety, risk, and compliance considerations into commercial decision‑making
* Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and influencing skills
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, including executive‑level reporting
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen

**Experience**

* 15-20 years' relevant experience in senior commercial leadership roles within large programmes, mega or giga‑projects, or complex construction environments
* Experience within GCC is highly desirable

**Benefits**
Comprehensive benefits package

data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
Saatchi & Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi & Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 114 offices. Global clients include HSBC, P&G, Toyota, Visa and GSK. Saatchi & Saatchi is part of Publicis Communications a key division of Publicis Groupe, the world’s third largest communications group.
  
  
**Overview**
The Business Director role is responsible for both building client relationships and managing a team, while collaborating with senior leadership ( Business Lead / CEO), other agency departments (creative, strategy, production) and other potential partners from Publicis Group (media, Vertical, epsilon, sapient)
  
  
This candidate will lead the strategic, operational and delivery aspects of major accounts and own relationships with Saatchi & Saatchi Wellness.
  
  
client(s).
  
  
They will work closely with the Business Lead of your account(s) and ultimately ensuring high levels of client satisfaction and revenue growth across your assigned client portfolio.
  
  
The Business Director will take responsibility & accountability for the growth of their team and client business, identifying and developing opportunities to drive new business proposals involving the group capabilities.
  
  
Foster the agency’s beliefs and spirit externally-internally, as well as develop and drive vision for the business, aiming to bring in more business and drive the Power of One development and implementation.
  
  
As part of their day-to-day office leadership team, the candidate will work to inspire, mentor, and guide the career development of your team members
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Technical & Product**

* Lead client conversations and work closely with Business Lead(s) to ensure excellence in strategy, creative
* and production.
* Oversee strategy, planning, creative execution, production for all assigned client accounts. Responsible
* for winning client commitment to the agency and Group’s direction, strategy, recommendations, and
* subsequent execution, translating business needs to creative challenges and ensuring a timely delivery
* milestone.
* Perceived as a trusted advisor by your own clients and as an expert in specific industry, internally and in the
* market, by demonstrating deep understanding and knowledge of category.
* Be able to define the correct scope, the needed resources and deliver accordingly to financial targets for the
* current year.
* Support in business development reports alongside other senior agency stakeholders and engage relevant
* group resources when appropriate.

**Business Acumen & Operational Efficiency**

* Responsible of all outcomes, quality control and the health of the relationship with the client across all
* disciplines, practices, facets of the business internal and external.
* Build strong client relationships to understand the needs and requirements to proactively support the
* day-to-day delivery of projects.
* Set the yearly strategic roadmap with the client on business transformation by becoming the trusted
* consultant and authority on the client’s consumer journey.
* Ensure that the brand strategy, client messaging and deliverables (from planning to roll out) are consistent.
* Serve in a brand guardian role.
* Responsible for the smooth operating of day-to-day workstreams and foster positive collaboration between
* senior team members, strategy & creative colleagues, and all other experts to facilitate smooth process and
* project management delivery.
* Lead your team on all plans (check and upload from markets), ensuring the process is running timely and
* efficiently.
* Drive business transformation and innovation for clients.
* Drives integration and interdependence across all capabilities to deliver high-standard integrated communication solutions
* Capable of breaking down silos to enable collaboration across different Groupe verticals and practices.
* Constantly aim to have award winning work delivered to get recognition for clients in their industry and
* get recognition as an industry leader in our field.
* Support other teams when pitching for clients of similar industry.
* Responsible for the management of a healthy and profitable client P&L.
* Responsible for the commercial tracking, forecasts, and numbers ensuring no blindsides negatively affect the
* agency’s commitments.
* Inspire, mentor, and nurture the team to build capability and develop competence.

**Qualifications**

* 10 years experience with a track record in creative, brand, digital, social and data-driven marketing projects in creative agencies, with a strong focus on healthcare communication.
* Experience in being client facing in a leading role
* Management experience of a team
* Arabic fluency is a must, as well as English
* Excellent understanding of end-to-end communication eco-system, with a deep understanding of the health industry , communications trends, and latest trends in data and marketing integration.
* Experience in planning, strategy, managing and activating multichannel campaigns.
* BA degree (or similar)

**Additional Information**
R-3712L-1170

data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
**Public Policy Associate Director**
**Job Location:**
Riyadh
  
  
**Reports To:**
Corporate Affairs Director
  
  
**About Astrazeneca**
AstraZeneca is a global, science-led, patient-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
  
  
**Site Description**
***AstraZeneca is experiencing a significant transformation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, driven by a commitment to advancing healthcare, innovation, and sustainable growth. Building on our global legacy, AZ KSA is rapidly evolving its operations to better serve patients, collaborate with healthcare stakeholders, and contribute to the ambitious goals outlined in the Saudi Vision 2030. We are investing in talent, digital solutions, and new ways of working; all designed to enhance our impact on patient outcomes and reinforce our leadership in therapeutic areas. This dynamic environment calls for visionary, agile professionals who thrive in change and are motivated to help shape the future of healthcare in KSA.***
**Role Summary**
The
**Public Policy Associate Director**
is responsible for shaping, executing, and advancing AstraZeneca’s policy and advocacy strategy in support of the business unit’s portfolio and objectives. Reporting to the Gulf Corporate Affairs Director, this leadership role focuses on analyzing and influencing the external policy environment, identifying opportunities and risks, and guiding the organization’s engagement with critical stakeholders. The position works cross-functionally with commercial, medical, regulatory, and government affairs colleagues to support patient access, drive business priorities, and ensure alignment with AstraZeneca’s mission and values.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**

* Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the policy landscape affecting AstraZeneca’s disease products, anticipating emerging trends and regulatory changes.
* Monitor relevant legislation, regulations, and advocacy activities to ensure compliance and proactively address potential risks to the business unit’s interests.
* Lead the design, implementation, and evaluation of public policy and advocacy projects that advance therapeutic access, reimbursement, and innovation for the respective therapy area(s).
* Assess and grow internal policy shaping capabilities, with a particular focus on ensuring alignment between national priorities and our therapy area-specific objectives.
* Ensuring KSA policy strategies are aligned with AstraZeneca’s global policy framework and contribute to broader corporate affairs strategy and must wins.
* Build and sustain relationships with key external stakeholders, including policymakers, senior government officials, patient advocacy groups, medical societies, NGOs, and industry associations.
* Serve as a strategic advisor to cross-functional teams, ensuring alignment between policy priorities and business goals. Act as a subject matter expert for policy-related input into brand plans, regulatory submissions, market access, and lifecycle management.
* Develop impactful policy position statements, white papers, briefings, and other communication materials for internal and external audiences.
* Track and report key policy and advocacy outcomes, supporting continuous improvement in strategy and execution.

**Essential For The Role**

* Bachelor’s degree in Public Health, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, or a related discipline required; Master’s degree in Public Policy, Health Economics, or a relevant field strongly preferred.
* Minimum of 3 years’ experience in healthcare policy, government affairs, or advocacy roles, with proven success in the pharmaceutical, biotech, or healthcare sector.
* Experience influencing public policy at national and/or international levels, including shaping legislative frameworks.
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and reimbursement environments relevant to AstraZeneca’s therapy areas.
* Familiarity with market access, pricing, and reimbursement challenges in innovative therapeutics.
* Exceptional analytical, interpersonal, and communication skills. Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross-functional initiatives.
* Strategic thinker, results-oriented, and adept at navigating ambiguous and evolving policy environments.
* Ability to represent AstraZeneca externally with credibility and impact.
* High agility in stakeholder management and consensus-building across diverse groups.

**Why AstraZeneca?**
At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
  
  
**So, what’s next?**

* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.

**Where can I find out more?**
Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
  
  
Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
  
  
Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
  
  
**Date Posted**
03-Apr-2026
  
  
**Closing Date**
14-Apr-2026
  
  
AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

data.jd_text:
**المسمى الوظيفي: مدير تطوير الأعمال**

**القسم: إدارة الاستثمار**

**التبعية الإدارية: مدير الاستثمار**

**الهدف العام للوظيفة:**

تحديد وتطوير الفرص الاستثمارية من خلال إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية، وتحليل أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية، بما يحقق تعظيم العوائد الاستثمارية وتحقيق النمو المستدام للمحفظة الاستثمارية.

**المهام والمسؤوليات الأساسية:**

**1. إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية:**

* إجراء التحليلات المالية والتقييمات الاقتصادية لدراسة جدوى المشاريع العقارية والاستثمارية.
* تحديد أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية بناءً على التحليل السوقي والتوجهات الاستثمارية.
* تطوير النماذج المالية لمختلف المشاريع الاستثمارية وتقييم العوائد والمخاطر المرتبطة بها.
* إعداد التقارير والتوصيات الاستثمارية وعرضها على مدير الاستثمار للإقرار.

**2. استكشاف وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية:**

* تحليل السوق العقاري والقطاعات الاستثمارية لتحديد فرص النمو والاستثمار.
* البحث عن فرص استثمارية جديدة تساهم في تعزيز قيمة الأصول وزيادة العائد على الاستثمار.
* دراسة الاتجاهات الاقتصادية والعقارية التي تؤثر على قرارات الاستثمار.

**3. تنسيق وإدارة المشاريع الاستثمارية:**

* العمل مع الإدارات المالية والقانونية لضمان توافق الاستثمارات مع الأنظمة والتشريعات.
* التنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية مثل المستشارين الماليين والمطورين العقاريين لتقييم وتنفيذ المشاريع.
* المساهمة في تطوير استراتيجيات الاستثمار وتحليل المخاطر بالتعاون مع مدير الاستثمار.

**4. إعداد التقارير وتقديم التوصيات:**

* تقديم دراسات الجدوى والتوصيات الاستثمارية لمدير الاستثمار لضمان اتخاذ قرارات مستنيرة.
* إعداد العروض التقديمية والتقارير الدورية حول أداء المشاريع الاستثمارية وفرص التوسع.
* متابعة تنفيذ المشاريع الاستثمارية وضمان تحقيق الأهداف المالية المخطط لها.

**المؤهلات والخبرات المطلوبة:**

* درجة البكالوريوس في إدارة الأعمال، المالية، الاقتصاد، أو تخصص ذو صلة.
* خبرة لا تقل عن سنتين في تطوير الأعمال، الاستثمار العقاري، أو التحليل المالي.
* معرفة قوية بإعداد دراسات الجدوى العقارية والتحليل المالي للمشاريع الاستثمارية.
* إتقان برامج التحليل المالي مثل Excel والنمذجة المالية وأدوات التقييم العقاري.
* مهارات قوية في البحث والتحليل واتخاذ القرارات الاستثمارية.
* الإلمام بالأنظمة والتشريعات العقارية والاستثمارية.

**الجدارات (الكفاءات) المطلوبة:**

**جدارات فنية:**

* التحليل المالي والاستثماري: القدرة على تقييم المشاريع واتخاذ قرارات استثمارية مستندة إلى بيانات.
* إعداد دراسات الجدوى: تحليل وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية بناءً على أفضل استخدام للأصول.
* التخطيط الاستراتيجي: المساهمة في وضع استراتيجيات استثمارية تدعم أهداف الشركة.

**جدارات إدارية وشخصية:**

* مهارات التفاوض: القدرة على التفاوض مع الشركاء والمستثمرين لتحقيق أفضل الصفقات.
* اتخاذ القرار وحل المشكلات: القدرة على تقديم حلول مبتكرة لدعم تطوير الأعمال والاستثمارات.
* إدارة الوقت والتنظيم: القدرة على العمل على مشاريع متعددة بكفاءة.
* العمل تحت الضغط: القدرة على العمل في بيئة ديناميكية واتخاذ قرارات سريعة ومدروسة.

**العلاقات الوظيفية:**

**الداخلية:**

* التعاون مع الإدارات المالية، القانونية، وإدارة المخاطر لضمان تنفيذ المشاريع بفعالية.
* تقديم التقارير والدراسات لمدير الاستثمار لمراجعتها واعتمادها.

**الخارجية:**

* التواصل مع المستثمرين، البنوك، المطورين العقاريين، والمستشارين الماليين.
* التنسيق مع الجهات التنظيمية لضمان الامتثال للأنظمة العقارية والاستثمارية.

**مؤشرات الأداء الرئيسية (KPIs):**

* عدد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى التي تم إعدادها والموافقة عليها.
* نسبة المشاريع الاستثمارية الناجحة مقارنة بالفرص المدروسة.
* العائد على الاستثمار (ROI) للأصول التي تم تطويرها بناءً على توصياته.
* جودة ودقة التقارير والتوصيات المقدمة لمدير الاستثمار.

Park Hyatt Doha is seeking an experienced
**Director of Sales & Marketing**

This role oversees Sales, Events, Marketing, and supports the Revenue function, ensuring strong market positioning, strategic partnerships, and effective execution of business plans. We invite driven, strategic, and brand‑minded leaders to join us in shaping the next chapter of Park Hyatt Doha’s commercial success.

Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community change in the s
data.jd_text:
Egis is a global organisation with over 20,000 employees worldwide. With our head office based in Paris, we offer global career opportunities, as well as offer rewarding careers for our people locally.

Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community change in the space of place-making, sustainability and creating connected cities. Different to other engineering firms, Egis offers true end-to-end capability across the entire design-to-operation lifecycle, offering advisory, architecture, engineering, design, asset management and operations services.

We are committed to creating great teams doing innovative work and would love
**you**
to join us to
**Impact the Future.**

**Job Description**

We are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of IT Applications to lead our applications management function in Lusail, Qatar. In this pivotal leadership role, you will oversee the entire IT applications portfolio, driving digital transformation initiatives and ensuring alignment with organizational business objectives. You will manage a talented team of IT professionals while optimizing application performance, managing vendor relationships, and implementing innovative technology solutions that enhance operational efficiency across the organization.

* Develop and execute a comprehensive IT applications strategy that aligns with organizational goals and supports business growth initiatives
* Lead, mentor, and manage a team of applications professionals, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence
* Oversee the full lifecycle of enterprise applications, including planning, implementation, maintenance, and optimization
* Analyze current application portfolio and identify opportunities for modernization, consolidation, and cost optimization
* Manage vendor relationships and negotiate contracts to ensure optimal service delivery and value for money
* Establish and enforce IT governance frameworks, policies, and standards for application development and deployment
* Direct digital transformation projects and ensure successful adoption of new technologies across the organization
* Monitor application performance metrics and implement improvements to enhance system reliability and user satisfaction
* Prepare and manage IT applications budget, ensuring efficient allocation of resources and cost control
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions
* Stay current with emerging technologies and industry best practices to maintain competitive advantage

**Qualifications**

\*\*Required Qualifications:\*\*

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in IT applications management and enterprise systems
* Minimum 5 years of progressive leadership experience managing IT teams and departments
* Proven expertise in enterprise application portfolio management and IT service delivery
* Strong knowledge of ERP systems, CRM platforms, and cloud-based technologies
* Demonstrated experience with digital transformation initiatives and organizational change management
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to make data-driven decisions
* Strong project management capabilities with experience delivering complex IT initiatives
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills
* Proficiency in IT governance frameworks and best practices

\*\*Preferred Qualifications:\*\*

* Project Management Professional (PMP) or ITIL certification
* Experience with IT financial management and budget optimization
* Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and application security best practices
* Familiarity with agile development methodologies and DevOps practices
* Experience in a multinational or global organization
* Background in business process optimization and systems integration

data.title: Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operati
data.jd_text:
Our client is a well-established, diversified group and market leader in the automotive space in Saudi Arabia. The organization plays a critical role in its sector and is recognized for operational scale, brand strength, and financial depth.

As part of its next phase of strategic growth and operational transformation, the group is seeking to appoint a
**Chief Executive Officer**
to join the executive leadership team. This role will partner directly with the Board of Directors to drive financial strategy, optimize capital structure, enhance governance, and support sustainable expansion across multiple business divisions.

This opportunity is suited to a commercially driven finance leader with experience in large-scale, multi-entity operations and strong exposure to working capital-intensive environments.

**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Automotive Dealership Group (KSA)**

**Overview**

A leading automotive dealership group in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia is seeking a dynamic and commercially driven
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO)**
to lead the organization through its next phase of growth, operational excellence, and digital transformation.

The CEO will be responsible for driving profitability, strengthening OEM partnerships, expanding market share, and positioning the business as a leading mobility solutions provider in line with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Leadership**

* Define and execute the company’s long-term strategy across vehicle sales, aftersales, and mobility services
* Align business strategy with Vision 2030, including localization, digitization, and sustainability initiatives
* Identify new revenue streams (EVs, fleet solutions, leasing, mobility platforms, etc.)

**Commercial & Financial Performance**

* Deliver top-line growth and optimize EBITDA across all business units
* Drive vehicle sales (retail, fleet, government) while maximizing aftersales profitability
* Ensure strong working capital management, inventory optimization, and cost discipline
* Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance tracking

**OEM & Partner Management**

* Maintain and strengthen relationships with global automotive OEMs
* Negotiate favorable commercial terms, distribution rights, and performance incentives
* Ensure compliance with OEM standards across showrooms, service centers, and brand representation

**Operational Excellence**

* Optimize dealership operations across sales, service, parts, and logistics
* Drive performance improvement initiatives across the branch network
* Enhance customer experience and retention through best-in-class service delivery

**Digital Transformation & Innovation**

* Lead digitalization across sales channels, CRM, and aftersales platforms
* Implement data-driven decision-making and performance dashboards
* Explore e-commerce, online car sales, and integrated mobility ecosystems

**People & Culture**

* Build and lead a high-performing executive team
* Drive a performance-oriented culture with strong governance and accountability
* Develop Saudi national talent in line with Saudization requirements

**Governance & Stakeholder Management**

* Report directly to the Board of Directors and shareholders
* Ensure strong corporate governance, compliance, and risk management frameworks
* Represent the company with regulators, government entities, and key stakeholders

**Candidate Profile**

**Experience**

* 15–20+ years of experience in automotive, mobility, or related sectors
* Proven CEO / Managing Director / GM experience within a large dealership group or automotive distributor
* Strong track record of delivering growth and profitability in complex, multi-branch operations
* Experience working with international OEMs is essential
* Prior experience in the GCC / Saudi Arabia is highly preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field
* MBA or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong commercial acumen with deep understanding of dealership economics (sales, aftersales, parts)
* Strategic thinker with hands-on operational leadership capability
* Expertise in turnaround, scaling, or transformation environments
* Strong financial literacy and performance management skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Visionary yet execution-focused
* High resilience and adaptability in a fast-evolving market
* Strong people leadership and cultural intelligence
* Entrepreneurial mindset with a focus on innovation

data.title: QNB3373 - Assistant Vice President - Climate Risk
data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries acr
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
  
  
QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard & Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3) and Fitch (A+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
  
  
Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
  
  
QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
  
  
**Summary**
The incumbent will join the Group Strategic Risk Management department and will support the Bank’s climate risk efforts globally. Working in close partnership with stakeholders across the Bank, the role will focus on delivery and coordination of risk management best practice in this evolving area. This will involve the enhancement of the Group’s framework to identify, measure, monitor and manage the financial risks from Climate Change in line with evolving regulatory and market expectations. The incumbent will be involved in the integration of climate risk into governance frameworks and processes and will collaborate with stakeholders across the Bank to implement specific climate risk management processes.
  
  
A key part of the role will involve taking ownership for the delivery of the QNB Group’s climate scenario analysis, including interpretation and communication of the resulting conclusions & the formulation of recommended actions. The role also encompasses responsibility for understanding and responding to new regulation and improving transparency and disclosures.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Support the development and implementation of a framework for identifying, measuring, monitoring and managing the financial risk from Climate Change in line with regulatory expectations
* Draft and develop governance materials and risk framework documentation
* Coordinate integration of climate risk into core governance frameworks and processes such as portfolio analysis, risk appetite and ICAAP
* Partner with risk management teams (e.g. Credit Portfolio Management, Market Risk) to drive portfolio analysis capabilities
* Review the output of the Stress Testing / scoring tool models and engage with Credit Approvers on determining the best course of actions for customer identified as presenting a high climate risk.
* Provide risk input into climate risk disclosures (e.g. TCFD)
* Develop expertise in the following areas: the drivers of Climate Change including how it affects economies and corporations, governmental and regulatory responses to Climate Change and emerging thought over how to measure and manage Climate Risk from a financial loss perspective

**Experience**

* University graduate preferably with a Major in Banking, Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration or related field of study (Masters preferred). Relevant professional certifications will be an added advantage (e.g. GARP Sustainability and Climate Risk).
* At least 10 years of relevant banking experience, preferably within a highly rated international bank, and in a managerial capacity
* Excellent understanding and knowledge of banking & risk management practices.
* Experience of framework design and implementation.
* Experience in dealing with and delivery of regulatory projects an advantage.
* Confidence and ability to communicate effectively with senior professionals and various stakeholder groups within QNB.
* Strong interest in continually developing skills and knowledge related to Climate Change and its implications for risk management.
* Excellent oral and written communication skills (including report writing) in English, while Arabic would be an added advantage.
* Leadership & Change Management abilities in influencing senior personnel throughout the group.
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to communicate both verbally and in writing with all levels of management.

Note: you will be required to attach the following:
  
  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

data.raw_snippet:
