data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Remarkable people, trusted by clients to design and advance the world**
This role will be responsible of the safe and effective delivery of assigned medium/large project or projects within an overall portfolio of brownfield modifications for client onshore facilities and offsho
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Remarkable people, trusted by clients to design and advance the world**
This role will be responsible of the safe and effective delivery of assigned medium/large project or projects within an overall portfolio of brownfield modifications for client onshore facilities and offshore platforms, including large production and processing complexes within an Engineering and Procurement services contracting model. To effectively undertake Project Management duties, in line with the “Wood way”, to lead and direct the successful delivery of each project, from early solution development through Detailed Design Engineering, Procurement and the preparation of projects for the Construction, Completions and Commissioning phase (by others), followed by the successful completion of the project Close Out phase, post-handover to Operations. Demonstrate delivery excellence for assigned projects, in line with relevant Wood and contract specific Project Management processes and procedures, as well as in accordance with the Contract Execution Plan (and where applicable, Project Execution Plan). Provide certainty and confidence to the client and Wood project sponsor, that each project is being delivered safely with a strong focus on effort optimization, cost efficiency & control, risk management, schedule adherence and stakeholder management. Ensure delivery of assigned project and/or projects within the agreed commercial framework, taking measures to manage financial threats/opportunities to the client and Wood throughout. Ensure a full understanding of, and compliance with, the terms and conditions of the agreed EPs framework agreement reimbursable contract, in all aspects of delivering the work.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Project Execution**

* Responsible for project HSSEQ leadership, ensuring a program of initiatives and a suitable auditing schedule is established and followed to ensure that HSSE and quality management issues are proactively addressed throughout project delivery.
* Categorize assigned projects into the appropriate Tier in line with Wood’s Right Size Solutions procedure, using the right people, tiering tools, etc. to assess and adopt the corresponding right sized (tiered/scaled) approach to ensure efficient and effective delivery, commensurate with the size and complexity of each project scope of work.
* Create Interface Management Plans and use interface registers as applicable depending on project size/tier in line with Wood and contract specific procedures.
* Responsible for the framing of project scopes of work, per phase, and facilitating the preparation of distinct CTRs, cost estimates, achievable delivery schedules, inclusive of suitable growth & contingency allowances depending on the level of scope definition and uncertainty per stage, then gaining client approval, reviewing contractual stipulations in client issued Purchase Orders and managing the successful execution of work under the terms of the contract for the agreed scope.
* Assist the Portfolio Delivery Manager with overall contract Profit & Loss, by delivering assigned projects within the agreed (and realistic) cost and schedule promises, ensuring Wood’s commercial and financial framework is understood and complied with, to ensure contractual liability risks are managed carefully, project benefits are realized, and overhead costs are minimized throughout project delivery.
* Provide input into annual budget and forecast determinations, ensure the timely and correct allocation of costs to each project, ensure the on-time completion of weekly timecards, facilitate weekly client review and approval of hours booked per project in support of avoiding delays with accounts payable/billing and cash collection.
* Organize the project team, define individual responsibilities and motivate team members towards successful achievement of specified project goals, particularly through regular project meetings.
* Identify and communicate project team objectives in accordance with the contract terms, scope of work and corporate policy.
* Delegate work to project team members in a manner that encourages individual responsibility and provides opportunities for growth.
* Provide leadership and direction to ensure stakeholder interfaces are managed effectively.
* Coordinate the development of project delivery schedules and master deliverables register (MDR), including the clear identification of schedule critical path, delivery KPIs, project key milestones and realistic activity duration estimates per phase.
* Ensure that compliance with applicable technical specifications, client discipline engineering standards and the required quality standards of engineering documents, equipment packages and materials of construction is fully understood and complied with by the Engineering Team for the agreed scope of work being delivered per project.
* Identify and communicate potential scope changes to the client sponsor as early as possible, agree the adoption or exclusion in principle for each then, if to be pursued, follow up with a formal Change Request to confirm the extent of the change in scope, schedule, cost & risk impact, obtaining written client approval and an accompanying PO amendment, prior to execution of the amended scope.
* Pursue and develop opportunities for innovation, such as digitalization and the use of applicable new technology where economically and technically viable, utilize Wood’s work share and global engineering centres (GEC) where appropriate, to bring efficiency and optimum value to Wood and the client.
* Actively seek out opportunities for cost and schedule savings wherever possible to optimize customer value on every project.
* Ensure project reporting of progress, productivity and delivery predictability is provided weekly per project and checked for accuracy/correctness before going live on internal and external (visible to client) project dashboards.
* Ensure the consistent set up and use of project document folders, the development and regular updating/issuance of project minutes of kick off/progress meetings, project action trackers with key decision log, project risk register in ProRisk with SMART risk mitigation actions assigned that are reviewed regularly for effectiveness and ensure the timely closure of actions and risks throughout the delivery of each project.
* Guide and direct a multidiscipline project team, which may include/involve external specialists and staff from multiple offices and sites.
* Facilitate the set-up (if not already in place) and adoption of effective information management systems / applications as applicable to suit various life phases of projects and manage information management within the project team, whilst always maintaining confidentiality of Wood and client data.
* Participate in project assurance activities, peer reviews, and lead lessons learnt reviews/adoption at appropriate (start and end of) project stages.
* Attend to and resolve conflicts, challenges and problems related to a large multi-cultural and multi-disciplined workforce.
* Participate in/lead Design Reviews, 3D Model Reviews, Value Engineering, Risk Management workshops, Constructability Reviews, HAZOPs/HAZIDs/LOPAs/SIL Assessments/PHSERs/IPRs etc., as applicable.
* Ensure Technical Evaluation of Bids, Issuance of Bid Technical Clarifications, Technical Evaluation Reports and Recommendations are undertaken by competent project team personnel in line with project schedules and budgets to meet Wood and client specifications.

**Leadership**

* Lead by example in all aspects of project delivery in line with Wood policies, procedures, standards of ethical conduct/behaviour, avoiding conflicts of interest and in compliance with the applicable country’s laws and policies.
* Coach and mentor others, empowering team members to make decisions within established parameters and competency levels.

**Designing the future. Transforming the world**
Reflecting The Market Focus For The Office In Both Brownfield And Green Field Opportunities, Multi-skilled Personnel Are Sought, In Particular Those With Experience In
  
  
Onshore Oil and Gas
  
  
Offshore Oil and Gas
  
  
**What We Can Offer**

* Meaningful and interesting projects delivered to leaders of industry across oil and gas and emerging energy sectors
* Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion; we are an organisation actively committed to diversity and inclusion across our busiess with employee networks committed to giving all employees a voice
* Competitive salary with regular salary reviews to ensure we are rewarding at the right level in line with the market
* Life Insurance; Provides payment of 2 x Base Salary (up to a maximum of QAR 1 million) upon death
* End of Service Gratuity; In line with Qatar Labor Law, upon completion of 1 years’ service employees are eligible for an End of Service benefit of three weeks for every year of service.
* Medical Insurance: Ensures cover (up to a maximum of QAR 250,000 per person, per year) is available should you require treatment. Pre-existing and/or chronic conditions are covered up to QAR 10,000.
* Employee Assistance Programme: Allows you to feel comfortable knowing that you or your immediate family members can confidentially discuss any work or personal issues that are an inevitable part of life. The programme helps support your mental, physical, social & financial well-being.
* Professional Memberships; One professional membership, registration, subscription, certification and/or license cost per annum for all active Wood employees. The membership must be relevant to the role you are currently employed in or be part of a development plan. Reimbursement should be claimed via the expenses procedure system, with supporting evidence.
* Global connections: join experts around the world who are at the leading edge of our industry, shaping the standards of our profession

**Qualifications**
**What makes you remarkable?**
At Wood, we are committed to equal opportunities and welcome all talented individuals to consider joining our team. So even if you don't match every statement below but feel you have some of the experience, knowledge or skills needed for this role, we encourage you to apply. It will take all of us working together to deliver solutions to the world’s most critical challenges.
  
  

* BSc or equivalent degree in an Engineering discipline from an accredited University, is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP), Associate in Project Management (APM) or equivalent certification, is preferred.
* Minimum of fifteen (15) years’ relevant experience in medium/large Brownfield oil & gas projects, including at least five (5) years in a similar position, is preferred, but not necessarily essential.

**Knowledge, Skills And Experience**

* Demonstrable ability to manage EPC, EPs and/or EPCM contracts for offshore and onshore Brownfield Oil & Gas projects for major Oil & Gas companies.
* Specific experience in the GCC region for renowned clients is preferred, but not necessarily essential.
* Positive personality, ability, and experience to drive, manage, direct and guide the team to achieve project objectives.
* Thorough understanding of project management techniques and practices.
* Experience of developing and implementing project measures of success/benefits/business priorities.
* High level of professional competence and management skills to motivate the team to achieve high quality performance during project execution.
* Demonstrable experience in stakeholder management, including implementation of Interface Management Plans and effective creation/management of interface register/actions.
* Thorough knowledge of project success and benefits management.
* Demonstrable ability to drive cash flow management as well as projection/forecast of cost at completion.
* Demonstrable experience of HSSEQ, commercial, schedule and technical risk management.
* Good knowledge of contracting models, conditions, types and their suitability in different situations.
* Demonstrable ability to deliver effective project initiation on multi-phase projects and produce project execution plans.
* Experienced in using common estimating techniques to derive estimates of project cost and schedule.
* Experience of implementing successful project performance improvement activities and techniques for recovering poor performance.
* Understands the information management requirements in each project phase (including handover to Operations, technical & commercial close out and final handover to client), internal (contractual, statutory) and asset (customer) documentation, as well as Intellectual Property/confidentiality.
* An awareness of international and company quality assurance standards.
* Knowledge of commercial and contract conditions applicable to the procurement of various types of goods and services.

**Desired Personal Attributes**

* Safety focused, with an uncompromising approach to HSSEQ risk management. Places the welfare of internal, sub-contractor and customer employees, property & equipment, reputation and the environment at the top of the agenda.
* Passionately pursues and supports, demonstrates and embeds Wood values.
* Pragmatic approach with ability to balance commerciality with operational project excellence.
* A motivated self-starter, who can encourage and motivate others, who is able to use own initiative and act autonomously to make appropriate decisions within circle of competence, but also knows when escalation is required.
* Strong team builder capable of identifying and adopting best practices, engendering a spirit of cooperation and energizing people towards optimum performance enabling cross functional best practice.
* Able to motivate, engage and influence a diverse group of people, many without a direct reporting relationship.
* Customer focused – develops sincere and open relationships with customers, current and potential; constantly striving to exceed expectations and add value. Able to develop and maintain strong customer relationships, including ability to influence appropriately.
* Ability to effectively manage resources (direct report personnel, Wood/client owned equipment, materials etc.)
* Flexible to respond and adapt to changing internal and external context/business environment.
* Decisive, with ability to make considered decisions and follow through, ensuring learning is captured and shared.
* Strong negotiation skills and ability to handle sensitive communications.
* Critical thinker with problem solving abilities.
* Excellent verbal, written and presentational communication skills.

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Senior Project Manager - Offshore
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
  
  
**Responsibilities:-**

* Leads budgeting and manages project operations to the budget. Controls project staffing levels, organizational structure, and monitors project discipline structures.
* Ensures project work and team activities meet all health, safety, environmental, and security requirements.
* To plan, co-ordinate and manage the design, procurement, construction and commissioning of assigned projects, including taking a leadership role in the preparation of proposals.
* To ensure clear agreement of client objectives and that these are met or exceeded
* To achieve or better the budgeted gross margin.
* Effective management of Worley/Client contract, including delivery of the budget gross margin.
* Manage and monitor project performance on an ongoing basis to identify issues and opportunities early and take pre-emptive action.
* Effectively manages project interfaces, including use of High Value Engineering centres.
* Develop resource & financial requirements from the project plan.
* Manage the design, procurement and construction activities to meet the project schedule.
* Project Manager ownership of the project schedule.
* Routine monitoring of the key reports and development of corrective action plans.
* Monitoring and control of all cost aspects of the project to forecast costs, obtain approvals, identify trends and take action to avoid cost overruns and take advantage of opportunities.
* Provide clear and focused leadership for the project team to create a vision for project success and a strategy to fit that vision.
* Assess procurement process throughout the project to ensure goods meet specification, are delivered on time and are within budget.
* Monitor the Construction Management function to ensure safe delivery of the project within cost and schedule objectives.

**Quality Assurance**

* Responsible for working within the provisions and guidelines of the Quality Assurance systems.
* Work with project managers/project engineers to ensure all projects are set up and executed in full compliance with all the requirements of the Worley Project Management Process (WPMP) and General Management System (EMS) using consistent approaches, Work Breakdown Structures, work methodologies and reporting systems.
* Monitors the closure of all identified risks and opportunities.

**Safety**

* Responsible for personal safety safe working practices. Understand and follow OH&S procedures
* Promoting health, safety and environmental awareness.

**Education – Qualifications, Accreditation, Training**

* Full-Time Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from an accredited university.
* Chartered Professional Engineer (CPEng) status or undertaking the same will be an advantage

**Industry Specific Experience**

* Prior experience must include significant project experience and successful project management.
* Vast relevant experience in a supervisory and/or project management role including technical expertise.
* Strong experience in Offshore experience on Brownfield projects.
* Mandatory experience in Pre-FEED and FEED phase

**HSE Capability**

* Maintain HSE focus with the team to ensure OHSE requirements.
* Demonstrate behavior and business practices commensurate with a culture of world’s best health, safety and environmental performance.
* Demonstrate a visible and active commitment to:

+ personal well-being;
+ healthy and safe workplaces and activities; and
+ continuously improve Worley health, safety and environmental performance.
+ Identify and report work hazards and incidents

**IT Skills**

* MS Office Suite

**People Skills**

* Able to work in diverse team.
* Able to make difficult decisions and lead and manage others in changing business conditions.
* Highly effective people management skills such as leadership, team, interpersonal, coaching, mentoring and supervisory skills. Must be able to build, motivate, develop and manage an effective team.

data.jd_text:
**Role: Area**
Operation Manager- UFC GYM QATAR

**Department:**
Operations

**Division:**
Facility

**Reporting to:**
CEO

**Role Objective**

Under the guidance of the Operation Director, the Operation Manager  will be responsible for the overall operation of UFC Gym and any future projects or ventures as instructed by the
Operation Director
. This involves setting the overall strategy and objectives for the company in conjunction with the
Operation Director
, and executing that strategy in order to achieve those objectives.

Once the strategy and objectives for the company are set, the Operation Manager  will be responsible for setting the structure of the company including the identification of required roles with job descriptions, the building of the organisational structure, the setting of a salary and commission/bonus structure, recruitment, the setting of brand standards, the implementation of policies and procedures, and the introduction of a training and development program in conjunction with the
Operation Director
and selected management to achieve the objectives of the company in line with the agreed strategy with the assistant and coordination with hr and having a fitness department as a whole.

The Operation Manager  will be responsible for the performance of the fitness and operation  as a whole in conjunction with the
Operation Director
and coordination within  management, and will seek to create a company that is motivated and consistently meeting and exceeding expectations. This will be achieved by identifying and setting goals, KPIs and targets based upon the overall strategy and objectives of the company that motivates management and team members and sets a standard for excellence within the company overall focus on performance fitness department

Finally, the Operation Manager  will continually seek to grow and develop the company by keeping their finger on the pulse of the fitness industry, listening to the needs and wants of our members and team members, identifying opportunities for growth and development within the market, and proposing solutions that capitalize upon those opportunities in line with the strategy and objectives of the operation overall.

**Duties and Responsibilities**

●      Responsible for the overall operation of UFC Gym and any fitness  and operations  under the guidance and instruction of the CEO.

●      Responsible for setting the overall strategy and objectives take part  in conjunction with the CEO and another management .

●      Responsible for the execution of the agreed upon strategy in order to achieve the agreed upon objectives in conjunction with the CEO.

●      Responsible for setting the structure of the operation and fitness  including the identification of required roles with job descriptions and the building of the organizational structure in conjunction with the CEO.

●      Responsible for the setting of a salary and commission/bonus structure in conjunction with the CEO.

●      Responsible for recruitment within the operation  in conjunction with the CEO and selected management, including the screening of applications, conducting of interviews, providing feedback after interviews and recommending candidates for roles at UFC Gym that fit within the organizational structure.

●      Responsible for the setting of brand standards within the company in conjunction with the CEO and selected management.

●      Responsible for the implementation of policies and procedures within the company in conjunction with the CEO and selected management.

●      Responsible for the introduction of a training and development program within the company in conjunction with the CEO and selected management.

●      Responsible for the performance of the company in general. Identifying and setting goals, KPIs and targets for the selected management that motivates them and sets a standard for excellence which translates to their team members and creates an environment where expectations are consistently met or exceeded.

●      Responsible for the growth and development of the company by identifying opportunities for growth and development within the market, and proposing solutions that capitalise upon those opportunities.

●      Responsible for ensuring all aspects of the business are operating as efficiently and effectively as possible, working in conjunction with the CEO and selected management to ensure there is adequate staffing in place to meet the demands of the business, deliver the best service possible to customers and maximise revenue generation.

●      Responsible for coordinating with all departments to ensure customer and staff satisfaction is maximised and issues are identified, reported and addressed at the earliest opportunity.

●      Responsible Facility Management and can be have a coordination within the management such as hr, finance, marketing, procurement and IT in conjunction with the CEO to maintain efficient and effective operations within the company that achieve the company's organizational objectives overall.

**Education and Work Experience Requirements**

●      MBA preferred.

●      Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality/Business/Management.

●      Recognised diploma/certification in Fitness.

●      8-10 years of relevant experience within hospitality or fitness industry operations, of which a minimum of 2-4 years should be in a supervisory/management role.

●      Experience in GCC/Qatar is preferable.

●      Arabic proficiency is an advantage.

●      Valid driver’s licence preferred.

Interested applicant can apply directly on careers@ufcgym.qa

data.title: EOI - Project Manager (Offshore)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Manager (Offshore) to join our team in Qatar. This is a key role within the Wood Doha office delivering across study, FEED, EPC and PMC scopes of work. In this role, you will be responsible for the execution of project work
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Manager (Offshore) to join our team in Qatar. This is a key role within the Wood Doha office delivering across study, FEED, EPC and PMC scopes of work. In this role, you will be responsible for the execution of project work in accordance with the project execution plan, including Wood and/or project procedures, maintaining Safety and Quality within the manhour, cost and project schedule targets.
  
  
Reflecting The Market Focus For The Office In Both Brownfield And Greenfield Opportunities, Multi-skilled Personnel Are Sought, In Particular Those With Experience In
  
  

* Onshore Oil and Gas
* Offshore Oil and Gas

**Responsibilities**

* Champions both Wood and client Health, Safety, Environmental and Quality cultures. Leads by example in ‘raising the shield’, demonstrating the ‘courage to intervene’. Ensures that procedures are followed and that a high standard of safety and quality is achieved in all associated work.
* Plan, direct, co-ordinate, and control the work
* Execute Projects in accordance with corporate practices and Project procedures
* Developing and implementing a project execution plan and project schedules that meets with Company and Contract requirements
* Provide leadership and commitment to the Project HSSE and Quality plan
* Keeping to the control budget within the objectives established for the Project
* To focus upon customer care and customer feedback
* To understand the Project ‘business case’ and drivers
* Act as focal point for Engineering, Procurement, and Project services resources deployed on the project
* Interface closely with client management representatives to ensure client interests are being accommodated
* Clearly define and communicate the project objectives and organization to the Project team
* To feedback to the Company data related to performance of work on a regular basis
* To monitor and expedite account receivables for the Project
* To document lessons learned and to review/implement lessons learned from other Projects
* To close out the project

**Qualifications**

* Undergraduate degree in an engineering discipline
* Minimum of 15-20 years of relevant experience
* Ideally candidates will have further education and certification in the field of Project Management, PMP or APM for example
* Must have good working experience of the Microsoft Office applications in the development of documents, presentations, trackers and schedules etc
* Is a self-motivated, proactive and highly driven individual with high standards, attention to detail and capable of demonstrating initiative
* High level of commercial aptitude and awareness. Should be able to interpret and follow the Contract whilst raising potential delays, change and commercial matters to Project Sponsors in good time
* Must be an excellent communicator, being a leader in the success of multi-discipline team delivery. Motivates teams in a positive manner to ensure a proactive approach in the delivery of timely solutions
* Highly experienced with risk and change management across the full project lifecycle, ideally having exposure to both design and site works. Highlights and quantifies change when it impacts the work
* Experienced across multiple project phases such as Concept/Feasibility, Pre-FEED, FEED, Detailed Design, Procurement, Construction, Commissioning, Star-Up and Warrantee
* Proven experience in managing lump sum contract for Engineering projects for oil and gas industry (Qatar experience is preferred)
* Able to lead others in a challenging environment
* Able to make decisions and drive decision processes
* Excellent analytical and abstract reasoning skills, plus excellent organization skills
* Well-developed management and administrative skills
* Works within a team to establish direction, alignment and commitment
* Well-developed interpersonal skills. Ability to get along with diverse personalities. Tactful, mature, and flexible
* High energy level, comfortable performing multifaceted projects
* Demonstrated servant leadership ability, team management, and interpersonal skills
* Well organized, credible and decisive

**Applicants Are Required To**

* Confidently deliver assigned scopes of work independently / remotely from management whilst leading others, with minimal guidance and direction
* Take ownership of scopes of work, coordinating the engineering disciplines and supporting functions to deliver successful outcomes
* Have demonstrable experience of working independently / remotely from technical leadership personnel (although functional leadership will be within the Doha office).
* Have demonstrable experience of working within a small project office, supporting cross discipline activities beyond their core discipline
* Be willing and able to represent Wood in both onshore and offshore surveys, holding relevant certification or willing to undertake suitable training such as BOSIET and H2S Awareness.
* Must have a proficient level of both written and spoken communication skills in the English language, able to interpret and disseminate complex scope and contract documents

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Strategic Projects Associate Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five ke
data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:

* **Value-Focused Portfolio:**
  Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.

* **Strengthen the Core:**
  Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.

* **Evolve the Core:**
  Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.

* **People:**
  Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.

* **Excellence in Customer Experience:**
  Creating superior customer experiences.

From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.

**Job overview**

* The role-holder supports the Group Strategy and M&A department in driving the Group’s most critical cross‑functional strategic initiatives. The role plays a pivotal part in shaping, structuring, and executing high‑impact projects aligned with the Group’s growth agenda, with an initial focus on data centers and AI/GPU‑as‑a‑service, as well as other new strategic projects of the Group

* The role holder acts as an extension of the project owner, ensuring content leadership, rigorous execution, and end‑to‑end delivery across multiple workstreams.

**Your impact on our goals**

Strategic Initiative Delivery

* Support the planning, design, and execution of cross‑functional strategic initiatives in alignment with Group strategic and financial objectives.
* Co‑own project scopes, delivery plans, and executive materials, ensuring clear articulation of problems, approaches, and strategic options.
* Drive structured analysis, business cases, commercial models, and recommendations for senior leadership.

Content Leadership & Subject-Matter Support

* Develop substantive content in areas related to data centers, AI/GPU-as-a-service, and new adjacencies.
* Conduct market scans, competitor intelligence, partner assessments, and scenario modelling to guide strategic choices.
* Translate conceptual strategy into actionable workstreams with measurable KPIs and milestones.

Project Governance & Cross-Functional Coordination

* Lead governance routines (e.g. SteerCos, cross‑BU checkpoints) and track progress across all stakeholders.
* Coordinate with Group and OpCo teams across commercial, operations, technology, finance, legal, procurement, etc.
* Ensure risks, dependencies, and escalation points are well-managed and communicated.

Expansion of Data Center and AI/GPU Strategy

* Provide support in driving the territorial and scope expansion of Ooredoo’s data center and AI/GPU offerings.
* Work closely with Syntys on performance insights while leading the strategic expansion and new territory feasibility assessments.
* Evaluate partnership, JV, or M&A opportunities for the expansion of Data Centers and AI/GPU offerings.

Strategic Project Origination & Pipeline Support

* Assist in shaping the pipeline of new strategic projects approved under the updated Group strategy.
* Evaluate new initiatives, structure problem statements, define approach, and provide analytical leadership during early-stage exploration.

Executive Communication & Stakeholder Engagement

* Prepare executive-level presentations, Board papers, and investor communications related to strategic projects .
* Communicate complex strategic topics succinctly to senior executives, shareholders, and external partners.
* Represent the department in cross-organizational discussions with senior management and external stakeholders.

**Experience and Qualifications**

* Minimum 15 years of experience in strategy, corporate development, management consulting, investment analysis, in telco industry or digital infrastructure.
* Experience in data centers and AI infrastructure strongly preferred.
* Proven track record managing cross-functional initiatives with senior‑level exposure.
* Experience structuring financial/business models and strategic assessments
* Strong strategic thinking and structured problem-solving.
* Excellent analytical and financial modelling capabilities.
* High-level communication and executive presentation skills.
* Ability to manage ambiguity and lead cross-functional alignment.
* Understanding of digital infrastructure, AI technologies, and emerging tech trends preferred.
* Project ownership mindset with ability to drive end-to-end execution.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Economics, or related field.
* Master’s degree (MBA, Strategy, Finance, or Technology Management) preferred
* Must have worked in developing markets, ideally in a multinational environment

data.title: Fixed Wing Senior First Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Responsibilities:**

* Performs duties in assigned airplane in compliance with Flight Operation Manual & other duties as may be assigned by Chief Pilot or Fleet Captain.
* Responsible for complete knowledge of operating procedures in assigned airplane.
* Conducts interior and pre-flight inspection
data.jd_text:
**Responsibilities:**

* Performs duties in assigned airplane in compliance with Flight Operation Manual & other duties as may be assigned by Chief Pilot or Fleet Captain.
* Responsible for complete knowledge of operating procedures in assigned airplane.
* Conducts interior and pre-flight inspections to ensure aircraft air-worthiness, to include aircraft log, time on engines, time on aircraft and maintenance work performed.
* Mentors new First Officer in his assigned airplane to help him improve and develop his skills.
* Checks personally, or with the First Officer, to ensure all manifests and documents are properly completed, passengers are accounted for and cargo is loaded and secured for the flight.
* Checks all instruments, engines and communications equipment prior to the flight.
* Obtains flight clearance and clears with Customs and Immigration officials.
* Checks weather reports and ensures safe weather conditions for the route, cancelling flight if safe conditions do not exist.
* Makes a final check after engines are started and requests/obtains clearance for take-off.
* Pilots the aircraft in accordance with established and well recognized airman procedures and ICAO/GACA/FAA Rules & Regulations.
* Provides technical supervision to the First Officer to ensure functions are performed in accordance with established procedures i.e. Manifests, trip reports, flight log.
* Maintains continuous radio communications with appropriate control facilities, making required position and weather reports while receiving changes/amendments to the flight plan and requesting/receiving landing clearance.
* Checks the safety and comfort of the passengers and ensures that the aircraft is being operated in compliance with established FAA, Company and Department Operating and Safety Regulations.
* Completes all assigned courses as required by the Training Unit or Fleet Captain.
* Clears through Customs & Immigration and secures the aircraft.
* Ensures that cargo is released and passengers are properly disembarked from the aircraft, while keeping proper record entries.
* Arranges/Directs the refueling, servicing and security of aircraft while away from home base.

**Education:**
Bachelor in Engineering or Technical Discipline

**Knowledge and Experience:**
Minimum Years of Experience: 08 Special Field Experience Min 3000hrs flight time

data.jd_text:
**Engagement details:**

* **Job Title:**
  Chief Operating Officer (COO) - Energy Sector
* **Client:**
  Prominent business conglomerate
* **Employment type:**
  Permanent
* **Location:**
  Onsite in Dammam, Saudi Arabia
* **Education:**
  Bachelor’s degree in Engineering with an MBA is preferred
* **Experience level:**
  15+ years
* **\*Indian candidates preferred**

**Role Overview:**

Our client, a prominent business conglomerate, is seeking an experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead the Industrial & Energy Division’s operations across KSA and Bahrain. The role carries overall operational responsibility for diverse business activities in machinery distribution, leasing, and energy products & services, with a strong mandate to achieve revenue and profit targets while driving the transformation from trading into a services- and local value–addition–led sustainable business model.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design, plan, and implement business objectives, operational procedures, and staff structures for the Industrial & Energy Division.
* Set comprehensive goals for business growth and success, ensuring alignment with the division’s strategic business plans.
* Establish and enforce policies and procedures that promote company culture, vision, and compliance with group guidelines.
* Oversee daily operations across machinery distribution, leasing, and energy products & services, providing direction to divisional general managers and executive teams.
* Lead employees by example, fostering a performance-driven, customer-focused, and collaborative culture.
* Evaluate business performance by analyzing and interpreting financial and operational data, metrics, and KPIs.
* Create regular reports and presentations for the CEO and Executive Committee, covering strategic implementation, financial performance, and operational progress.
* Take the lead in business expansion activities, including new business lines, offerings, and regional growth within KSA and Bahrain, and support the CEO in executing strategic plans.
* Maintain and strengthen relationships with key customers, principals, partners, and vendors, including senior management teams of key accounts.
* Ensure positive cash contribution to the group through focused management of stocks, receivables, and working capital.
* Continuously evaluate and improve core processes against industry best practices across planning and budgeting, workforce management, operations, customer satisfaction, and staff performance.
* Drive succession planning for key positions, maintain prescribed localization levels in each country of operation, and attract and retain local talent.

**Key Skills and Qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical or Chemical Engineering with an MBA is preferred.
* Minimum 15+ years of experience providing products and services into core sector industries such as energy, oil & gas, power & utilities, construction, mining, and manufacturing within the GCC region, with more than 10 years in an operational leadership position in a diverse business environment. KSA experience is preferred.
* Proven ability to run a large, independent profit centre with diverse business activities, including responsibility for revenue, profit, and cash flow objectives.
* Strong leadership, people management, and execution skills, with experience leading senior managers and cross-functional teams.
* Demonstrated capability in strategic planning, budgeting, and forecasting, as well as in implementing and monitoring KPIs and MIS for decision-making.
* Track record in business expansion, customer relationship management, and developing close working relationships with senior stakeholders, customers, and principals.
* Strong analytical thinking skills, perseverance, people management skills, high emotional intelligence, and a consistently customer-focused approach.

data.title: Vice President - Instrumentation & Control Systems
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation & Control Systems division. This role carries full end-to-end responsibility for the business unit, including
**P&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfaction**
.
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation & Control Systems division. This role carries full end-to-end responsibility for the business unit, including
**P&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfaction**
.

The Vice President will play a critical role in driving growth, operational excellence, and transforming the business into a high-performing provider of integrated instrumentation, automation, and control system solutions across industrial and infrastructure sectors.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Business & P&L Leadership**

* Own full P&L responsibility, driving revenue growth, profitability, and operational efficiency
* Develop and execute annual business plans, budgets, and financial targets
* Track financial KPIs and implement corrective actions as needed
* Provide regular performance and risk updates to executive leadership

**Commercial Strategy & Market Development**

* Lead tendering, pricing, proposals, and contract negotiations
* Ensure competitive, compliant, and profitable commercial offerings
* Identify and develop opportunities in instrumentation, automation, control systems, and smart industrial applications
* Build and strengthen relationships with utilities, industrial clients, EPC contractors, and consultants

**Project Delivery Excellence**

* Oversee all projects from award through final handover
* Ensure delivery meets schedule, cost, quality, and safety targets
* Establish and maintain a robust PMO framework for planning, risk management, and reporting
* Improve resource utilization and reduce rework and field issues

**Engineering & Systems Integration**

* Build strong engineering capabilities across instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA/RTU, and systems integration
* Define engineering standards, design guidelines, and quality control processes
* Strengthen turnkey and integrated solution delivery capabilities

**Customer & Stakeholder Management**

* Act as the senior escalation point for key customers and partners
* Drive customer satisfaction and conduct regular business reviews
* Ensure timely resolution of commercial or execution issues

**Organization & Talent Development**

* Design and optimize the organizational structure
* Lead, mentor, and develop senior managers across commercial, engineering, and operations
* Identify talent gaps and support recruitment, training, and capability development
* Foster a culture of accountability, safety, and continuous improvement

**Candidate Profile**

* 15+ years of experience in industrial instrumentation, automation, and control systems
* Proven P&L leadership experience in a project-based or engineering organization
* Strong commercial, contractual, and negotiation skills
* Deep technical knowledge of instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA, and systems integration
* Demonstrated ability to lead large, multidisciplinary technical teams
* Excellent communication and stakeholder-management capabilities

data.jd_text:
***Engineer the future of global finance. At Citi, our Tech team doesn’t just support finance – we are helping to redefine it. Every day, $5 trillion crosses through our network. We do business in 180+ countries operating at a scale few can match. From deploying advanced AI to helping shape global markets, we build systems that matter. Look to join a team where your work helps influence economies, your ideas can drive innovation and outcomes, and your growth is backed by mentorship, continuous learning and flexibility with potential hybrid work opportunities. Help solve real-world challenges that touch millions and get the opportunity to build the future of finance with Citi Tech.***
The IT Project Senior Analyst is a seasoned professional role. Applies in-depth disciplinary knowledge, contributing to the development of new techniques and the improvement of processes and work-flow for the area or function. Integrates subject matter and industry expertise within a defined area. Requires in-depth understanding of how areas collectively integrate within the sub-function as well as coordinate and contribute to the objectives of the function and overall business. Evaluates moderately complex and variable issues with substantial potential impact, where development of an approach/taking of an action involves weighing various alternatives and balancing potentially conflicting situations using multiple sources of information. Requires good analytical skills in order to filter, prioritize and validate potentially complex and dynamic material from multiple sources. Strong communication and diplomacy skills are required. Regularly assumes informal/formal leadership role within teams. Involved in coaching and training of new recruits. Significant impact in terms of project size, geography, etc. by influencing decisions through advice, counsel and/or facilitating services to others in area of specialization. Work and performance of all teams in the area are directly affected by the performance of the individual.
  
  
**Responsibilities:**

* Coordinates activities of the project team, identifies necessary resources and develops schedules to meet completion deadlines.
* Verifies project team adherence to control and risk implementations as well as standards and process changes.
* Determines scope and impact of project risks and issues; raises and resolves issues.
* Applies good understanding of concepts and procedures within own IT project leadership area to resolve issues.
* Demonstrates a comprehensive understanding of how areas of IT project leadership collectively integrate to contribute to achieving business goals.
* Provides evaluative judgment based on analysis of factual information in complicated and unique situations.
* Directly impacts the IT project leadership area through shared responsibility for delivery of end results and contribution to planning, budget management and formulation of procedures; influences resource planning.
* Persuades and influences others through communication and diplomacy skills; may negotiate with external parties.
* Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency.

**Qualifications:**

* Significant experience in an IT project leadership role with commensurate people management experience.

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s/University degree or equivalent experience

data.raw_snippet:
**WELCOME TO BASF**
We are the world's leading chemical company because we offer intelligent solutions for our customers and for a sustainable future. We link and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to advance. Not only your performance, but
data.jd_text:
**WELCOME TO BASF**
We are the world's leading chemical company because we offer intelligent solutions for our customers and for a sustainable future. We link and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to advance. Not only your performance, but also your personality matter to us. At BASF, careers develop from opportunities.
  
  
BASF’s regional division EMEA Europe, Middle East, Emerging Europe and Africa. BASF operates in more than 50 countries in the region. For BASF the EMEA region is our most important market.
  
  
**What You Can Expect**

* Executive & Administrative Support Manage the MD’s schedule and priorities, organize leadership and teams’ meetings, prepare agendas and presentations, and document meeting minutes while tracking key action items.
* Office Coordination & Business Reporting

Support coordination of regional office activities and prepare internal reports, dashboards, quarterly reviews.
  
  

* Communication & Stakeholder Management

Manage professional communications on behalf of the MD, including coordination with headquarters, regional offices, customers, distributors, and key partners. Support preparation of executive correspondence and business updates.
  
  

* Meetings, Events & Executive Logistics

Organize management meetings, customer visits, distributor engagements, and business events. Coordinate travel arrangements and logistics for the MD, visiting executives, and leadership activities.
  
  

* Governance, Compliance & Risk Coordination

Support the MD in coordinating governance and compliance activities, including monitoring adherence to local laws and corporate guidelines, maintaining documentation related to organizational structure and delegated authorities, supporting risk management processes, audits, incident or crisis management coordination, and ensuring follow-up with responsible departments on regulatory, EHSQ, trade compliance, and contractual matters.
  
  

* Cross-Functional & Operational Coordination

Liaise with internal departments (sales, marketing, finance, HR, supply chain, and legal) to follow up on MD priorities, including business reporting support, employee-related matters, and ensuring timely execution of key operational and regulatory actions.
  
  

* In the lead with BASF Saudi Arabia LLC Co. and other entities' PA's in the region to keep the job profile of PA's fit and adjusted to the increasing complexity and changing requirements of the Middle East organisation.
* Apply BASF Group guidelines and principles.

**What You Offer**
**Education**

* Bachelor in Administration
* Commercial training

**Professional Experience**

* Excellent writing and presentation skills in English (Arabic beneficial)
* Expert in Microsoft Office applications
* Experience in managing a similar role is a must.

**Diversity is our greatest strength!**
Become a part of our winning formula for success and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces inclusion and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief.

data.title: Vice President Sales & Marketing - Oil & Gas
data.raw_snippet:
**About The Role**

We are looking for a commercially driven and strategically minded Vice President of Marketing and Sales to lead FPI's go-to-market function across global and multi-regional markets. This is a senior executive role with full ownership of the marketing and sales strategy, revenue g
data.jd_text:
**About The Role**

We are looking for a commercially driven and strategically minded Vice President of Marketing and Sales to lead FPI's go-to-market function across global and multi-regional markets. This is a senior executive role with full ownership of the marketing and sales strategy, revenue growth agenda, and commercial team performance. You will partner with the leadership team to shape how FPI competes, grows, and wins — and you will build the capabilities needed to sustain that growth over the long term.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Strategy and Business Planning**

* Lead the development and implementation of the organisation-wide marketing and sales strategy, integrating commercial priorities with FPI's broader corporate direction.
* Anticipate market megatrends, competitive shifts, and emerging opportunities to keep FPI ahead of the curve.
* Drive annual and multi-year business planning for the sales and commercial function, setting revenue targets, KPIs, and resource budgets.

**Marketing and Sales Leadership**

* Take full ownership of FPI's marketing strategy — brand positioning, market segmentation, campaign development, and customer engagement.
* Design and deliver the sales strategy across all product lines and geographies, ensuring a disciplined and high-performance commercial operation.
* Build and develop a personal network of senior decision-makers, specifiers, and industry influencers across the oil and gas and infrastructure sectors.
* Represent FPI at major industry events, trade bodies, and client forums to promote the organisation and strengthen its market reputation.

**Commercial Performance**

* Set and manage the commercial function budget in alignment with organisational strategy.
* Manage, report on, and continuously improve the performance of the marketing and sales function against agreed KPIs and revenue objectives.
* Hold direct reports accountable for achieving their performance objectives; take timely corrective action where needed.

**Stakeholder Engagement and Collaboration**

* Identify and engage stakeholders up to board and top-management level, understanding their priorities and ensuring FPI's commercial strategy responds effectively.
* Act as a strategic advisor to the leadership team on all commercial, market, and sales-related matters.
* Ensure that supporting functions — including Product Innovation and R&D, Services, Production, and Quality — elevate their performance to meet the standards expected in the oil and gas industry.

**Capability Building**

* Assess the current capabilities of the commercial team, identify gaps, and lead targeted development initiatives.
* Inspire, mentor, and coach the team to fulfil their potential and deliver extraordinary results.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* An MBA or advanced graduate degree is highly preferred.

**Experience**

* 15+ years of progressive marketing and sales leadership experience, including at least 5–7 years at VP level or above in global or multi-regional roles.
* Demonstrated success driving revenue growth and P&L ownership in complex, multi-geography commercial environments.
* Proven track record leading cross-functional transformation initiatives and managing large, diverse commercial teams.
* Significant exposure to the oil and gas sector and/or industrial pipe, infrastructure, or engineered products markets is strongly advantageous.

**Skills and Competencies**

* Strategic thinker with the ability to translate vision into executable commercial plans.
* Strong financial acumen and experience owning budgets and forecasts at a senior level.
* Exceptional stakeholder management and communication skills — credible at board level and in the field.
* Commercially curious with deep capability in customer and market analysis.
* Adaptive, resilient, and comfortable navigating complexity and ambiguity in fast-moving markets.
* Results-oriented with a consistent track record of delivering against ambitious targets.

data.title: IT Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**IT Project Manager**

Join an established insurance organisation where technology delivery directly impacts business performance, customer experience, and regulatory compliance.

This is a hands-on Project Manager role within the IT function, focused on delivering critical initiatives across the b
data.jd_text:
**IT Project Manager**

Join an established insurance organisation where technology delivery directly impacts business performance, customer experience, and regulatory compliance.

This is a hands-on Project Manager role within the IT function, focused on delivering critical initiatives across the business. If you enjoy structure, accountability, and driving projects from idea through to implementation, this is a strong platform to grow your impact.

**The Role:**

As Project Manager, you’ll take ownership of projects from conception to completion. You’ll work closely with business users, IT teams, and external vendors to ensure delivery is on time, within scope, and within budget.

You’ll sit within the IT Project Management function, reporting to the Assistant Manager, and play a key role in coordinating cross-functional initiatives across the organisation.

This role suits someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable operating in a structured, regulated environment.

**What You’ll Be Doing:**

• Developing detailed project plans, defining scope, timelines, deliverables, and resource allocation.

• Leading cross-functional teams to ensure smooth collaboration and clear accountability.

• Engaging stakeholders across departments to gather requirements and manage expectations.

• Identifying risks early and implementing mitigation strategies to avoid delays or cost overruns.

• Monitoring project performance and ensuring deliverables meet defined quality standards.

• Preparing and presenting status updates to senior management and key stakeholders.

• Working with vendors and external service providers to ensure successful implementation.

• Reviewing completed projects to identify lessons learned and improve internal processes.

**What You’ll Need to Succeed:**

• Bachelor’s degree in IT, Project Management, or a related field.

• 3–5 years of experience managing IT or technology-related projects.

• Experience within the insurance sector is strongly preferred.

• Strong understanding of Agile and Waterfall methodologies.

• Hands-on experience with tools such as MS Project, Jira, or similar platforms.

• Confident stakeholder management skills across technical and non-technical teams.

• Strong organisational skills and the ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.

• PMP or equivalent certification is an advantage.

**What’s in It for You:**

• A stable and structured environment within a well-established organisation.

• Exposure to cross-department initiatives with real business impact.

• The opportunity to strengthen your project leadership capability within a regulated sector.

• A clear reporting line and defined project governance framework.

**Next Steps:**

If you’re currently managing IT projects and looking to take ownership in a structured insurance environment, this could be the right move.

Send your CV or get in touch in confidence to learn more.

As a Project Manager, the per
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
The candidate should be a natural leader and have worked with reputable joinery manufacturing companies and the interiors industry (similar to Havelock One) for the last 8 years with experience in managing customs and retail installation projects.
  
  
As a Project Manager, the person must be self-driven with a high responsibility level; capable of effectively launching and managing multiple projects of different sizes from award of project and through the different stages of implementation to handover independently. Versatile and adaptive management of internal and external stakeholders is key. Communication skills are very important for the role, and the successful candidate will be a natural communicator and good articulator in both oral and written English.
  
  
The profile will be a naturally dependable member of the leadership team that is able to bring about improvement and measurable positive changes in output and efficiency over time.
  
  
The profile will be a team player, able to identify strengths and weaknesses in a situation and bring out the best of people in challenging situations.
  
  
**Role Description**
**Project Kick-off**
**:**

* Set up a kick-off meeting with relevant internal Havelock One departments and the appointed fit- out team. Where necessary, coordinate with the general contractor team to align project scope, timeline, and expectations

**Site Assessment**

* If needed to be able to conduct initial site visits, perform surveys, take photographs, identify loading zones, and provide feedback to the Setting Out Manager (SOM) regarding any crucial dimensions or site-specific considerations

**Technical Expertise**

* Utilize hands-on experience or expertise to carry out the setting out/marking of joinery equipment on-site if needed
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during the project kick-o? and the Mw manufacturing cycle
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during

MW installation by thoroughly understanding the MW equipment throughout its lifecycle.
  
  
**Project Management**

* and the project's work schedule, preferably using MS Projects, to ensure timelines are met
* Generate daily/weekly site progress reports, including necessary photos, and submit them to the Project Manager (PM) and SOM for review
* Manage multiple projects at various stages of development, independently prioritizing and executing tasks to meet deadlines and achieve objectives
* Proactively manage ongoing projects, taking initiatives on tasks without requiring constant supervision or follow-ups

**Communication And Coordination**

* Maintain effective communication and coordination with fit-out teams, factory personnel, and clients/client representatives daily. Relay any discrepancies to the line manager for quick resolution
* Observe the installation process first-hand and report to the setting out team any adjustments needed to the MW equipment to facilitate future fit-out installations
* Demonstrate high self-confidence and clear self-expression during client interactions, negotiations with client demands appropriately and handling high-pressure situations with composure
* Effectively coordinate with fit-out teams, considering the full project scope when assigning tasks, and providing direct responses to on-site queries and issues

**Travel And Flexibility**

* Willingness to travel to countries in the MENA region and beyond. Adapt to flexible working hours, including weekends, depending on travel and site plans as required

**Experience**
**Candidate Requirements**

* Minimum of five to eight years similar experience in a joinery manufacturing companies with experience in managing hospitality and entertainment projects

**Skills**

* Proficient in verbal and written English
* Ability to work with AutoCAD, Excel, Word, and MS Projects
* Strong customer service skills, ensuring client satisfaction and addressing concerns promptly

**Attributes**

* Sound knowledge of fabrication procedures and a wide understanding of joinery materials including timber, boards, veneers, laminates, hardware, fabrics, glass, stone, lighting etc are vital
* An individual with high responsibility levels who takes ownership of matters, has good planning & time management capabilities, effective communicator and basically a flexible individual who can take decisions and make things happen in a large setup
* Excellent organizational and time-management skills
* Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail
* Ability to work independently as well as part of a team
* Strong interpersonal skills to effectively liaise with diverse stakeholders
* Self-driven with a strong internal drive to achieve goals and tackle challenges head-on without the need for external motivation
* Intrinsically motivated, consistently seeking out new opportunities for growth and improvement
* Excel at managing multiple tasks simultaneously, ensuring that each receives the attention and e?ort needed to succeed
* Ability to plan thoroughly, considering potential consequences and the bigger picture
* Capacity to follow clear instructions and ensure the correct implementation on-site
